title: NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator (Candidate Pooling)
description:
Job Title: NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time





Position Summary



We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented NDIS Intake, Rostering & Compliance Coordinator to support the day-to-day administrative operations of an NDIS provider. This role focuses on participant onboarding, intake, service agreements, service bookings, rostering, scheduling, inbox management, stakeholder coordination, workforce compliance, and reporting support.



The ideal candidate has 4–5 years of experience in administration or coordination, preferably within NDIS, disability services, healthcare, or community services, and can manage multiple tasks accurately in a fast-paced remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Manage participant intake and onboarding, including referrals, forms, consent documents, record setup, and file maintenance

Prepare, update, and track service agreements and assist with service bookings

Coordinate rostering, scheduling, calendar updates, appointment changes, and service confirmations

Manage shared inboxes, respond to routine queries, and coordinate communication with participants, families, staff, and stakeholders

Maintain worker compliance records, onboarding documents, clearances, certifications, and expiry tracking

Ensure participant, workforce, scheduling, and service records are accurate and updated across internal systems

Prepare trackers, reports, and status updates related to intake, rostering, compliance, and service administration

Monitor outstanding documents, onboarding progress, scheduling gaps, and compliance issues, and follow up as needed

Support smoother operations by identifying administrative gaps and helping improve workflows, templates, and processes



Requirements



4–5 years of experience in administration, coordination, or operations support

Previous experience in NDIS, disability services, healthcare, allied health, or community services preferred

Experience with participant onboarding, rostering, scheduling, service agreements, compliance tracking, and stakeholder communication

Strong knowledge of Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, CRM systems, and cloud-based admin tools

Excellent organisation, communication, and follow-up skills

High attention to detail, confidentiality, and ability to work independently



Key Skills



Participant onboarding and intake administration

Service agreements and service booking support

Scheduling, rostering, and calendar coordination

Inbox and stakeholder communication management

Worker compliance and workforce administration

Systems updating, reporting, and process improvement



Performance Indicators

Timely and accurate completion of onboarding and admin tasks

Accurate service agreement, booking, and compliance records

Efficient scheduling and rostering coordination

Timely response and follow-up on inbox and stakeholder communications

Quality of reports, trackers, and system updates

Strong support for smooth and organised daily operations



Why Join Us?



Be part of meaningful work that supports participants and care teams

Join a supportive and professional team that values collaboration

Enjoy remote flexibility in a structured work environment

Grow in a role where your skills and initiative are valued

Make a real impact through strong coordination and quality support



Ready to Apply?



If you’re organized, proactive, and ready to contribute to a purpose-driven team, we’d love to hear from you. Apply now and grow with us.

title: YouTube Video Editor / Channel Assistant — Full-Time
description:
YouTube Video Editor / Channel Assistant — Full-Time



Hey there!



I'm looking for a full-time virtual assistant to work on my YouTube channels. This is a long-term position, 20hours per week, at $200/month.



What you'll be doing



My team has built a tool that creates videos from scratch using images. The videos come out as about 60% images and 40% video footage — your job is to add video clips sourced from YouTube into the existing image-based edits. It's a straightforward process once you get the hang of it.



You'll also be given a Claude AI account with custom skills to generate scripts and thumbnails, so a lot of the creative heavy lifting is already handled for you.

What I'm looking for



Experience editing videos for YouTube channels

Basic knowledge of video editing (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar)

Reliable internet and available to work full-time

Previous experience managing a YouTube channel is a plus but not required



How to apply

To be considered, you must include all of the following in your application:



Take this free IQ test: 
 — screenshot your results and attach them. Please don't cheat, it's there so I can see how you think, not to judge you.

Share 1–2 links to videos you've previously edited or worked on so I can see your style.

Tell me briefly about your experience with YouTube editing.



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We’re a boutique branding studio based in the Netherlands, working at the intersection of identity, systems, and design execution. We’re looking for a Brand & UI Systems Designer — someone who can translate brand identity into structured, scalable visual assets across decks, templates, interfaces, and documentation.



This is a part-time remote role (3 fixed days/week) with the potential to grow into a full-time position. You’ll work on both client-facing and internal design systems — creating clarity, consistency, and structure in everything you build.



If you enjoy making brands work — not just look good — this is for you.



---



What You’ll Do



- Apply and extend brand systems across digital and print applications

- Design structured layouts, branded decks, templates, and documentation visuals

- Build and maintain brand kits, internal design tools, and asset libraries

- Create light UI components and visuals that support interface design (e.g., Webflow mockups, content visuals)

- Work independently but collaboratively — with support from our design and strategy team

- Use Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign as your core tools

- Keep all files organized, scalable, and developer-ready where needed



---



What This Role is Not



This is not a generalist or social media content role.



It’s also not for junior designers focused purely on visual trends or aesthetics.



We’re looking for someone who:



- Thinks in systems, not just single-use visuals

- Builds brand architecture, not just one-off designs

- Can adapt identity into interface and layout logic



---



What We’re Looking For



- 5+ years of experience in branding, identity design, or UI-aligned visual systems

- Strong portfolio showing brand system implementation across multiple touchpoints

- Experience creating and managing assets like design kits, templates, and documentation

- Confident with tools like Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign

- Good habits around file structure, versioning, and organized delivery

- Excellent English (C1/C2 level) — both written and spoken

- Available to work 3 fixed days/week (6–8 hours/day)

- Comfortable working independently and owning deliverables



---



Nice to Have



- Experience with Shopify (designing assets, layout support)

- Familiarity with Webflow or other no-code platforms

- Proficiency with Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Interest in building internal systems and improving design operations



---



Compensation & Benefits



- Monthly range: 45,000 – 65,000PHP, depending on experience and portfolio 

- Final offer based on your portfolio, profile, and a short design use case test

- Path to grow into a full-time position if the collaboration is strong

- 13th month bonus for long-term contributors (including part-time)

- Be part of a team that values clarity, autonomy, and systems thinking



---



How to Apply



Send us:



- Your portfolio — focused on brand systems, templates, or UI-aligned identity work

- A short motivation explaining why this role fits your skill set and mindset



If there’s a potential fit, we’ll invite you to complete a short design use case as part of the evaluation.

title: Full-Time Remote SEO Link Builder & Outreach Specialist (Portfolio of Multiple Websites)
description:
We are a growing company with a portfolio of websites and need a dedicated, full-time remote Link Builder to take full ownership of our off-page SEO. You will buy and secure high-quality backlinks, write & post guest articles, monitor rankings and traffic impact, and deliver consistent results across all our sites. This is a long-term role for someone who loves results and can work independently./



Key Responsibilities:



Prospect, outreach, negotiate, and buy high-quality links (niche edits, guest posts, resource links, paid placements – mix of free + paid is fine)



Research, write, or coordinate SEO-optimized articles and get them published on relevant sites



Monitor daily/weekly rankings, traffic, and backlink profiles using Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console



Perform competitor backlink gap analysis and find new opportunities every week



You tell us what links to buy weekly or monthly



Keep detailed tracking sheets and send professional weekly reports (links acquired, cost, live URLs, ranking impact)



Ensure every link is relevant, high-authority, and white-hat



What We Offer (Hybrid Pay – You Earn More When You Deliver More):



Base salary: $850 – $1,000 USD per month (depending on experience and proven results)



Performance bonus:  extra for ranking/traffic lifts (to be discussed later as websites perform)



Separate reimbursable link-buying budget ($1,000–$2,000+/month across all sites – you control spending)



Full-time (40 hrs/week), long-term, with room to grow



Work from anywhere (strong preference for Philippines for time-zone alignment)



Requirements:



1+ years real experience buying links, guest posting, and outreach (not just theory)



Proficient with Ahrefs / SEMrush for ranking monitoring and competitor research



Strong English writing skills (you will post articles)



Highly organized and self-motivated – able to manage 5–15+ websites at once



Portfolio of recent links you have secured (we will check them in Ahrefs)



How to Apply:



Reply with the subject line “Link Builder Application – [Your Name]” and include:



Your expected monthly base salary



8–10 examples of backlinks you personally secured recently (URLs + short note on how you got each)



Screenshot or description of how you currently monitor rankings



Why you’re the right person for a multi-site portfolio role



We need people that are self motivated, we don't have time to chase people up.

) mainly. I will need help sourcing/finding clips to post on the account as original content. The majority being clips from places like CNBC, Fox News, Squawk Box, Bitcoin/Crypto interviews/podcasts. title: E-commerce Supply Chain Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing European e-commerce brand selling across Amazon EU, 
 and other marketplaces, supported by a main warehouse in the Netherlands and multiple external fulfillment networks (FBA & LVB).



We are looking for a structured and hands-on Supply Chain Coordinator / Specialist to own replenishment execution, shipment coordination, and inventory control.



This is NOT an admin role.

This is a planning, execution and control role.



Responsibilities:



• Plan and execute replenishment to FBA and LVB from our NL main warehouse

• Balance stock across external warehouses while protecting main warehouse levels

• Plan based on daily sales velocity, stock on hand, and incoming inventory

• Prioritize fast restocking of out-of-stock SKUs

• Create and manage FBA shipments in Seller Central (box & pallet)

• Coordinate shipments with our fulfillment partner and carriers

• Manage pallet bookings via Amazon Freight

• Support AGL container planning where relevant

• Maintain shipment tracking and PO planning in Airtable

• Allocate order line quantities across containers (manual allocation)

• Organize and upload shipping documents accurately

• Maintain clear inbound visibility at all times



Requirements:



• 2–4+ years experience with Amazon FBA operations

• Strong understanding of replenishment planning and inventory flow

• Experience with international freight and warehouse coordination

• Strong Airtable / spreadsheet skills

• High attention to detail and structured working style

title: Shopify & Zendesk Customer Service Agent (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and experienced Customer Service Agent to join our expanding eCommerce team. This is a part-time role with the potential to transition to full-time based on performance.



This position is not suitable for beginners. We need someone who can work independently, follow established workflows, and handle customer issues with minimal supervision using our customer service guide.





Role Details:



- $4/hour

- 20 hours per week (Monday–Friday)

- Timeproof tracker required for logging work hours

- Opportunity for full-time hours based on performance



Key Responsibilities



- Manage customer inquiries via Zendesk

- Process return requests for refunds or exchanges

- Handle chargebacks and PayPal disputes



Minimum Requirements:

(Please DO NOT apply if you do not meet all of the following criteria)



- 1+ year of experience in customer support, specifically in drop shipping eCommerce

- Hands-on experience with Shopify and Zendesk

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Ability to work independently and follow detailed workflows

- Must be able to use our customer service guide effectively

- Self-starter with a quick learning ability

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Must have no other job 

- Positive team player attitude



Preferred Experience:

-Familiarity with Duoplane or similar order management systems



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS 



Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in automatic rejection. Please ensure you complete ALL steps as follows:



1. Subject line format: [Your Favorite Animal] – Shopify CSR Application

2. In the body of your application, please answer the following questions:

- How many tickets did you handle per day in your last role?

- What was the name of the drop shipping store you worked with? (This confirms relevant experience.)

- Describe a difficult customer situation you faced and how you resolved it.

- How did you manage return requests in your previous job?

- Share examples of similar roles you’ve held in the past.

3. Record a short loom video (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your relevant experience, including how you’ve handled:

- Return requests

- "Item not received" complaints

- "Wrong item received" complaints

- "Item not as described" complaints



We will only review applications that follow these instructions exactly.

title: Ebook Editor / Proofreading / Copyediting
description:
The ideal candidate will be responsible for refining ebooks and books generated by our internal AI system, making them more engaging, human-sounding, accurate, and error-free. This role involves correcting grammatical mistakes, improving clarity and readability, enhancing the value of the content, and ensuring the manuscript aligns with the client’s expectations for a polished, professional final product.



The editor will work with a prewritten draft created by AI. Your primary focus is to elevate the content through precise, detail-oriented editing—making small but impactful improvements that enhance flow, structure, tone, and usefulness for the intended audience. You should be able to spot inconsistencies, content gaps, weak explanations, or missing context, and fill them in as needed based on the project brief.



We are specifically looking for someone who has strong experience with proofreading, copyediting, and more complex editorial work—even before the rise of AI tools. Your expertise in traditional editing will help us merge high-quality editorial standards with our innovative AI-driven systems to create a smooth, modern workflow.



You will also play a valuable role in helping us improve our internal processes. As you work with our drafts, we expect you to give us feedback and help identify areas where our systems can be refined so we can consistently deliver better, more accurate first drafts to you and the rest of our editing team.



Responsibilities:



- Edit and proofread ebooks and books for grammar, clarity, tone, structure, and readability.

- Enhance AI-generated drafts to make them engaging, accurate, and aligned with the intended audience.

- Improve content using small but meaningful edits rather than rewriting the entire draft.

- Ensure the manuscript meets the client’s brief, style preferences, and project goals.

- Identify and address content gaps, unclear explanations, or inconsistencies.

- Conduct light research when necessary to strengthen sections or add missing context.

- Provide insights and suggestions to help us improve our AI prompts, templates, and systems.

- Prepare clean, polished documents ready for formatting and design.



Requirements:



- Strong experience in proofreading, copyediting, and substantive/complex editing (prior to AI).

- Exceptional writing and editing skills, with the ability to elevate AI-generated content.

- Strong attention to detail and organizational abilities.

- Ability to interpret and meet client expectations while maintaining content accuracy.

- Familiarity with Google Docs and ChatGPT (or willingness to learn quickly).

- Creative thinking, analytical skills, and the ability to enhance content quality.

- Full fluency in American English, including grammar, spelling, and style conventions.

- Experience with ebooks, book editing, digital products, or Amazon KDP is a strong advantage.



P.S. We are looking for someone who can work consistently almost every day during the week. You don’t need to start full time, but we require at least 20–25 hours per week from the beginning. We receive new orders almost daily, and we want you to be able to take on projects promptly. As we continue to scale, this role can grow into a full-time, long-term partnership with even more hours and ongoing work.



Looking forward to working together!

Tomas Placko

title: Migration of landing pages ASAP
description:
In need of a web design specialist to facilitate the migration of 2 landing pages in Framer to Wordpress. Tasks include

• Rebuild and redesign 2 existing Framer landing pages within the WordPress environment

• Match the current visual design, layout, branding, typography, spacing and overall user experience as closely as possible

• Maintain as many existing Framer animations, hover states, transitions and interactive effects as possible within WordPress

• Ensure both landing pages are fully responsive across desktop, tablet and mobile

• Build pages in a way that is easy to update internally post-launch

• Configure all page sections, buttons, forms and CTA pathways to function correctly in WordPress

• Recreate or embed any required forms for ebook downloads, enquiry submissions and sales call bookings

• Integrate booking tools, CRM forms (goHighLevel) or third-party embeds where required

• Setup and configure Google and Meta pixel tracking across both landing pages

• Configure event tracking for key conversion actions including page views, ebook downloads, button clicks, form submissions and sales call bookings

• Verify that all tracking is firing correctly through tools such as Meta Events Manager, Google Tag Manager and/or GA4

• Setup thank you pages, redirects or conversion confirmation steps where needed

• Optimise page speed, image compression and overall performance for WordPress

• Test browser compatibility across major browsers

• Test all links, forms, tracking events, booking flows and downloads before launch

• Implement any required privacy, cookie or tracking consent elements

• Support domain or subdomain connection 

• Conduct final QA and pre-launch checks

• Provide post-migration support for minor fixes after launch

title: Elite AI Video Creator (MUST use Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0)
description:
We are Interlink AI, an emerging Synthetic Media Studio based in Australia. We build hyper-realistic, cinematic commercial video assets for enterprise brands.



We are looking for a bleeding-edge AI Video Creator & Prompt Engineer to join our production pipeline. I do not care what niche your current portfolio is in (sports, luxury cars, architecture, cyberpunk, etc.)—I just want to see your undeniable, god-tier visual quality and motion consistency.



THE NON-NEGOTIABLE TOOLS: You MUST be an active user of Nano Banana Pro and/or Seedance 2.0



Your Responsibilities:

- Taking our creative briefs and visual equations (First Frame + Last Frame).

- Executing complex frame-to-frame interpolations using your software access.

- Managing the rendering queues (Your Philippines timezone is a massive advantage here for hitting Chinese servers during their off-peak hours).

- Delivering raw, broadcast-ready MP4s to our shared Drive.



???? HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully - This is a test):

I receive hundreds of spam applications. To prove you are a real human and actually have active access to these specific tools, you must format your application exactly like this:

1. Start your message with the exact word: SYNTHETIC

2. Send me a link to your portfolio (Google Drive, YouTube, Instagram, etc.) showcasing your absolute BEST videos generated specifically using either Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0. Tell me which tool you used for the videos.

3. CRUCIAL: You must attach at least ONE uncropped screenshot of your actual computer screen showing the Nano Banana Pro or Seedance 2.0 workspace/UI with a generation in progress. I need to see the tool interface to prove you have an active account/workflow and didn't just download someone else's video.



If you are an elite operator who understands how to bend these specific models to your will, we have a massive opportunity for you to scale with our studio.

title: AI Content Creator & Community Manager (US Basketball/Sports)
description:
About Us:

We run a highly scalable social media network based in Australia. Our flagship basketball debate brand, KingVsAir, is rapidly expanding its daily output. We are looking for a hungry, detail-oriented AI Content Creator and Community Manager who lives and breathes US basketball culture and can execute a strict, high-volume content formula.



To succeed in this role, you cannot just be a casual fan. You need a deep, almost encyclopedic knowledge of the NBA, historical matchups, player stats, and the current debate culture to create content that genuinely hooks a hardcore basketball audience and drives massive comment velocity.





The Software You Will Use:



Nano Banana Pro: You will be provided access to generate images via our centralized Higgsfield Team Account so there is no cost to you. All text generation happens natively inside the prompt—no Photoshop or Canva required.



Seedance 2.0 & Topaz: You will generate high-fidelity video motion using Seedance 2.0, and then use Topaz to upscale all final video assets to crisp 4K at 60fps. (Note: Access to these external tools will be provided. Once Seedance 2.0 is available on Higgsfield, we will transition that step into our Team plan).



Google Drive & 
: 
 is our HQ for all communication, concept pitches, and draft reviews (using a simple emoji approval system). Final high-resolution assets are strictly uploaded to our shared Google Drive.





Your Daily Responsibilities:



Content Generation: Generate 5 AI images (Nano Banana Pro) and 6 short-form videos (Seedance 2.0 + Topaz upscaling) daily, strictly following our established text/image debate formulas and visual hooks.



Copywriting: Write highly engaging captions, relevant hashtags, and debate-sparking questions for each post to drive community interaction.



Asset Management: Upload all drafts to designated 
 channels for quick review, then push final approved assets to Google Drive.



Community Management: Act as a moderator for our page via Meta Business Suite. Reply to comments to boost algorithmic engagement, manage our official
 Group, and ensure our lead magnet links (wallpaper packs) are pinned in the comments as soon as posts go live.





What We Are Looking For:



Deep, obsessive knowledge of the NBA, basketball history, and debate topics (e.g., MJ vs. LeBron, peak performances, rings vs. stats). You should be able to spot a flawed basketball argument from a mile away.



Experience with AI image generation, video creation tools, and video upscaling software.



Reliability to hit the 11-post daily quota consistently.



Excellent written English for copywriting and community replies.





Compensation & Perks:



Base Pay: $400 - $500 USD per month ($100 - $125/week), paid weekly via Wise.



Performance Bonus: An end-of-month cash bonus if the page's overall Average View Duration hits our target metrics.



Buffer Time: This is a full-time, 40-hour/week role. The content generation will leave you with healthy buffer time each day to handle moderation, research, and ideation without burning out.





How to Apply:

Please reply with the phrase "Nothing but net" at the top of your application so we know you read the entire post. Include a brief summary of why your favorite NBA team will (or won't) win the championship this year, and link to any previous AI, video editing, or community management work you have done.

title: Marketing Analyst (SQL/AWS)
description:
PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 
/applyjob-noncaller-1



About Us:

With over 100 years of combined industry experience, the Community Minerals team specializes in the purchase of mineral or royalty rights all over the US. We have earned a stellar reputation with hundreds of satisfied customers and an “A” Rating with the Better Business Bureau. With our proven track record, we continue to serve mineral owners in several states with transparency, accountability, and a personalized experience to meet individual needs.



Job Summary:

The Marketing Performance Analyst’s core objective is to empower the Marketing team with actionable insights to drive data-driven marketing strategies and optimize campaign performance. This role requires advanced skills in querying databases (MySQL/AWS) and generating detailed analytics reports that align marketing efforts with strategic objectives, ultimately enhancing marketing performance and ROI.



Job Description:



• Develop comprehensive reports from multiple data sources (MySQL, AWS, CRM systems), providing actionable insights to track and optimize marketing campaign performance.

• Generate, update, and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly KPI reports for the marketing team, assessing performance across channels, identifying trends, and making data-driven recommendations to enhance marketing strategies.

• Create and manage reports for 3 teams within the marketing department, tailoring insights and metrics to support their specific goals and objectives.

• Coordinate with Lead Management Specialists to ensure raw data sources are maintained and up-to-date, ensuring data accuracy and consistency across all marketing datasets.

• Work closely with leadership to provide strategic data insights, helping to align marketing campaigns with overall business goals and objectives.

• Implement, maintain, and refine data processes for collection, cleansing, maintenance, analysis, and validation across marketing datasets.

• Use MySQL and AWS to create, execute, and optimize queries for efficient data retrieval, supporting rapid decision-making and automated reporting where possible.

• Collaborate with marketing and leadership teams to understand key metrics, providing data analysis that drives strategic adjustments, campaign refinements, and business insights.

• Develop and implement forecasting models to predict marketing responses and conversion metrics, supporting marketing budget and resource allocation.

• Develop and maintain process documentation for all reporting and analysis tasks, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and alignment across teams.

• Provide ongoing recommendations based on data analysis to continuously optimize campaign performance, customer segmentation, and conversion strategies.



Qualifications:

• Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Statistics, Data Science, Marketing Analytics, Computer Science, or a related field.

• Experience: 3-5 years of performance analysis, specifically in a marketing team setting. Experience with MySQL and/or AWS data environments is required.



Technical Skills:

• Advanced proficiency in SQL for data manipulation and querying, with a strong preference for experience in MySQL or AWS.

• Intermediate to advanced skills in Excel and/or Google Sheets for data visualization and modeling.

• Strong familiarity with CRM platforms; knowledge of marketing automation tools is a plus.

• Analytical Skills: High-level analytical skills to identify trends, understand root causes, and make data-backed recommendations.



Additional Skills:

• Strong quantitative skills with the ability to apply statistical methods to marketing performance data.

• Ability to work independently and cross-functionally, handling multiple projects in a dynamic, deadline-driven environment.

• Excellent communication skills to present data insights effectively across various organizational levels.

• Must be willing to work during US business hours



What's in it for You:

- Competitive Compensation: Earn $4.19-$5.25 per hour, commensurate with your skills and experience.

- Work your way: Remote Work Set-Up enabling you to operate from the comfort and convenience of your own chosen workspace

- Flexible Healthcare Bonus (Philippines): A healthcare bonus you control. Use it for HMO coverage, life insurance, or set it aside as an emergency fund—whatever best supports your well-being. It’s entirely up to you.

- Success Incentives: Enjoy company bonuses and performance-driven rewards.

- Soar with Us: Opportunities for career growth and promotions await you.

- Positive Vibes Only: Experience a supportive and uplifting work culture.

- Annual Bonus: We value your dedication throughout the year, rewarding you with an annual performance bonus shared at the end of the year.

- Performance Raise: Your hard work doesn't go unnoticed. Be ready to seize opportunities for a salary increase based on your outstanding performance.

- Performance Incentives: We believe exceptional work deserves recognition. Performance incentives are awarded to individuals who demonstrate outstanding contributions, initiative, and results. It’s our way of celebrating excellence and motivating continued success.

- Discretionary Bonus: At Community Minerals, exceptional work doesn’t go unnoticed. Contractors who consistently go above and beyond may be rewarded with discretionary bonuses, a token of appreciation for outstanding contributions, impactful results, and dedication to excellence. Let your work speak, and the rewards will follow!



Other Requirements:

- Willing to work in US Business Hours (CST)

- Must have stable Internet and Power Connection

- Must have a Computer with at least 2 monitors set up, a stable Internet Connection



System Requirements:

To ensure optimal performance and functionality while using different web and application tools, please make sure that your syste
ets the following requirements:



Operating System:

- Windows: Windows 10 (64-bit) or higher

- macOS: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or higher



Processor:

- Intel: 8th Gen Core i3, i5, i7, or newer

- AMD: Ryzen 3 (2018) or newer



Memory (RAM):

- A minimum of 8 GB of RAM is required.

- Recommended: 16 GB RAM for multitasking and optimal performance



Job Type: Full-time





Application Question(s):

Have you created reports using data from MySQL, AWS, or CRM systems?

Have you maintained KPI reports for a marketing team daily, weekly, or monthly?

How many years of experience do you have as a Marketing Performance Analyst?



Work Location: Remote

title: Real estate admin
description:
Role Overview

The role focuses on identifying and contacting owners of existing HMOs with the aim of sourcing off?market or pre?market acquisition opportunities. The assistant will work primarily through HMO licensing databases, council records, and other publicly available sources to build accurate lead lists and initiate first contact with landlords. The goal is to help secure properties that already hold HMO status, removing the risks associated with planning permission, Article 4 restrictions, and change?of?use applications.

Key Responsibilities

•  Search and extract data from local authority HMO registers, licensing databases, and other public records to identify suitable existing HMOs.

•  Compile and maintain lead lists including landlord names, contact details, property addresses, licence status, and any relevant notes.

•  Conduct outreach to landlords via
, phone, or messaging platforms to introduce the company, gauge interest in selling, and arrange follow?up conversations.

•  Track all communication in a structured CRM or spreadsheet, ensuring accurate notes, dates, and outcomes.

•  Pre?qualify opportunities by gathering basic information on property condition, tenancy status, rental income, and landlord motivation.

•  Monitor changes in HMO licensing data and flag new opportunities as they appear.

•  Support negotiation preparation by providing background research on properties, comparable sales, and local market conditions.

•  Handle sensitive information with confidentiality and professionalism at all times.

Skills & Experience

•  Strong research skills and the ability to navigate council databases and public records.

•  Excellent written and verbal communication, especially for professional outreach.

•  Comfortable making cold or warm contact with landlords and property owners.

•  Highly organised, with experience using spreadsheets or CRM tools.

•  Ability to work independently, follow processes, and meet weekly targets.

•  Prior experience in property sourcing, lettings, acquisitions, or virtual assistance is beneficial but not essential.

Personal Qualities

•  Persistent and proactive in following up leads.

•  Detail?oriented, especially when handling data.

•  Professional, polite, and confident when speaking with landlords.

•  Motivated by results and comfortable working to KPIs.

Working Hours & Structure

•  Remote, flexible working.

•  Part?time or full?time depending on availability and performance.

•  Weekly reporting on leads generated, contacts made, and opportunities identified.

Purpose of the Role

This position directly supports the acquisition strategy of purchasing existing HMOs, allowing the business to bypass planning risk, Article 4 restrictions, and delays associated with change?of?use applications. The assistant plays a key role in sourcing compliant, income?producing properties that can be purchased quickly and efficiently.

title: Director of Marketing / Social Media Specialist
description:
Seeking a part-time Director of Marketing with a strategic mindset to spearhead our
 marketing and communications strategies, ultimately driving sales growth and enhancing customer retention. This position will be responsible for the comprehensive development and implementation of promotional efforts for the upcoming release of “Six Until Dawn.” 

The ideal candidate will blend innovative thinking with data-driven analysis to ensure messaging consistency, brand alignment, and measurable outcomes. This role also entails providing strategic oversight and operational support to facilitate the successful scaling of book sales. 



This opportunity is imbued with purpose and has the potential to make a significant impact by effectively communicating Jeannie Wishal’s work and values to a global audience.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES:

•
 Campaign Strategy: Design and execute a targeted marketing campaign for the author, focusing on both sales’ generation and educational outreach. 

• Content Creation: Craft a detailed overview of the author, Jeannie Wishal, that emphasizes her expertise and aligns with our strategic objectives. The focus should be on encouraging the target audience to engage in her literary works and highlighting how they complement and advance our mission and goals.

• Campaign Management: Develop a dedicated webpage for promoting author book signings, incorporating functionality to direct potential readers to purchasing options for the book. This page should feature an engaging layout, integrate a calendar for upcoming events, and include hyperlinks to various retail platforms where the book is available for sale. Additionally, implement best practices to enhance visibility and drive people to the site.

• Analytics and Reporting: Monitor response metrics and optimize sales conversions while pinpointing opportunities for enhancement.

• Collaboration: Collaborate intensively with the author to devise comprehensive campaign strategies that align with overarching objectives and desired outcomes.

• Customer Support: Deliver technical guidance and support to customers, troubleshooting issues effectively, and optimizing operational workflows for seamless performance.

• Event Coordination: Coordinate the logistics for book signings, encompassing the planning and execution of setup, inventory control, and promotional initiatives to optimize engagement and operational efficiency.

• Ensure meticulous documentation of all communications and interactions by leveraging suitable software solutions.



EDUCATION: Associate degree (minimum)



EXPERIENCE: Minimum of 3 years of experience related to Sales and Marketing.



CERTIFICATION: N/A



KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS, AND ABILITIES:

• Exceptional time management and organization skills

• Strong oral and written communication skills

• Ability to work independently, collaboratively, and under supervision.

• Willingness to serve and build relationships with customers and the author

• Must possess strong initiative, leadership skills, organizational and project management skills, with the ability to multitask in managing a variety of projects and priorities, coordinating the actions of others, follow through on duties to timely completion, and demonstrate excellent judgment with attention to detail.

• Microsoft Office experience with Word, Outlook, Publisher, Excel, and PowerPoint software experience.

• Must support the author’s mission.



WORKING CONDITIONS: Work is performed indoors, with minimal safety hazards, and requires seated, standing, and moving work.



The outlined responsibilities and qualifications should not be viewed as an exhaustive list of all expectations for this role; instead, they delineate the core criteria for this position. Currently, this is a part-time role, with the potential to convert to full-time contingent upon exceeding sales and marketing performance benchmarks.



Applicants should submit a link to their CV as part of the application. In your cover letter, state the years of experience in marketing and share a brief summary of your marketing experience and the roles you have previously worked in.

title: Webflow Designer for Service-Based Websites
description:
Are you a Webflow designer who leans more editorial, refined, and minimal than techy and heavy?



We’re looking for a designer to support ongoing client projects.

Our work is strategy-led, clean, and conversion-focused, with a strong emphasis on white space, hierarchy, and restraint.



This is not a role for “just build it” developers.

We care about how things feel, not just how they function.



THE TYPE OF WORK WE DO



We design websites for service-based businesses.



Think

Clean layouts

Strong hierarchy

Generous white space

Refined typography

Subtle interactions

Elevated, considered design



Not

Dark, heavy, tech-style builds

Over-designed layouts

Cluttered sections or excessive effects



If your portfolio leans corporate, SaaS, or developer-heavy, this likely isn’t the right fit.



WHY YOU’LL ENJOY WORKING WITH US



Clear direction. Strategy, copy, and wireframes are provided

Defined scope. No guesswork, no vague briefs

Flexible hours. Work to deadlines, not fixed shifts

Respectful collaboration. No last-minute chaos

Long-term partnership. Consistent work for the right person



We prioritise quality over speed.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Build websites in Webflow based on provided strategy and wireframes

Translate brand direction into clean, high-end layouts

Structure CMS collections logically

Apply SEO basics during build

Refine and improve existing Webflow sites

Ensure all builds are easy for clients to manage



Optional



Design in Figma before build



REQUIRED SKILLS



WEBFLOW

Strong experience building in Webflow

Confident with CMS, components, and interactions

Clean builds only. No messy overrides or shortcuts



CLIENT-FIRST

Solid understanding of Client-First structure

Clear class naming and scalable systems



SEO BASICS

Proper heading structure

Meta titles and descriptions

Alt text and CMS SEO fields

Internal linking



THE NON-NEGOTIABLE



Your work must demonstrate

Strong use of white space

Clean, minimal layouts

High-end, service-based design

Thoughtful typography



We will not consider portfolios that



Feel overly masculine, tech-heavy, or corporate

Are cluttered or visually noisy

Prioritise effects over clarity



YOUR WORKING STYLE



You work well independently with clear direction

You communicate early if something’s off

You meet deadlines

You’re open to feedback

You take pride in clean, considered work



HOURS AND RATE



Part-time, ongoing

Flexible hours

Work to deadlines, not fixed shifts

Rate based on experience



HOW TO APPLY



2 to 4 live Webflow sites you personally built

At least one clean, service-based website

An example using Client-First

A short note on how you approach SEO in Webflow

Your hourly rate and weekly availability



Applications without relevant examples, do not reside in the Philippines or who do not provide the above will not be reviewed.

title: Quickbooks Online Advanced - MASTERY LEVEL - HIGHLY PROFICIENT - Bookkeeper
description:
Established in 1984, PTFS, LLC is a commercial services company headquartered in Houston TX. Some of our clients have been longstanding customers of ours for over 40 years. We are extremely data driven and we use Excel heavily for most of our data metrics. We also use Quickbooks Online Advanced for Accounting among others. We utilize the spreadsheet sync function in QBO advanced, and we rely on many of the reports both standard & customized in QBO advanced to make informed decisions. 



We are in process of building a fully remote team in the PH which will eventually take over all US based operations. We are looking for tea
mbers LONG TERM. We value loyalty and tenure-ship and most importantly, availability. We would like all of the tea
mbers we bring onboard to retire with us. We are firm believers that everybody working here deserves the opportunity to grow. Everyone will have a clear understanding of the trajectory of their career path with us. After 1 year, every tea
mber will go through the process of performance review determining promotion / increase in compensation. The metrics we use are:



- Improved understanding of company processes 

- Thoroughness & speed in taking proper actions 

- Frequency of errors / how individual has corrected them

- New responsibilities assumed since hire

- Dependency & Availability

- Does the individual go above & beyond? 

- Is the individual eager to take the lead in any situation?

- Does the individual possess other skills helpful to the company? 



Our line of work is very fast paced with ever-changing requests from clients. Schedules are set but can change at any given 
nt. It is important for tea
mbers to understand what needs to be done when a sudden change is requested by a customer as there are field workers who are dependent on the office to communicate such changes.  As a tea
mber, we need you to be versatile, stepping up or filling in at any given 
nt if another tea
mber is busy or unavailable. Thus, we don't have a separation of duties. Each tea
mber must be able to do EVERYTHING 



We are seeking tea
mbers who have a MASTERY PROFICIENCY LEVEL in Quickbooks Online Advanced and are able to quickly setup, repair, or upkeep ALL features at a high level. We are seeking those who have a strong accounting background & very high proficiency using MS EXCEL. When applying for the position, please respond with your self-assessed proficiency rating 1-10 to the following Quickbooks & Excel features. Please take some time to think about your rating with honesty and transparency. 



QBO ADVANCED

-NEW Company setup & new connections

-Troubleshooting & fixing broken connections

-Mastery of migration -from QB Desktop or other

-High level use of journal entries 

-Chart of Account design & organization

-High level use of all types of custom fields

-High level use of classes, locations & tags

-High level use of products / services / items - design & organization 

-High level use of bundles for products / services / items

-Tracking Project profitability; estimates vs actuals

-Advanced knowledge of customized financial statements

-Mastery of customizing forms such as invoices, statements, bills etc.

-Mastery of building reports from scratch

-Mastery of payroll module within QBO

-Mastery of payroll liabilities & reporting

-Setting up or fixing customer payment links

-Setting up of form templates for invoices, statements etc

-Setting up or fixing QBO to bank connections

-Bank feed renaming rules & matching; over-riding

-Advanced understanding of Sales Tax setup for multi-location clients

-Mastery of batch invoicing & billing

-Mastery of batch reclassifying

-Complete mastery of using spreadsheet sync

-Setting up or fixing 3rd party app syncing with QBO Advanced

-Mastery of customer: sub-customer: projects -design & organization 

-Mastery of setting up inventory & upkeeping

-Mastery of sales orders & purchase orders

-Setting up workflow automations

-Utilization of QB Online & all of its features at a high level



 MS EXCEL

-Xlookup & Vlookup

-Index & Match

-Conditional Formatting

-Pivot Tables

-Power Query

-Data Validation

-Macros

-Dashboards

-Advanced Charting



Please list any and all other software / apps / programs you are proficient in: Scale 1-10

We are a verified Amazon and Walmart partner agency managing a growing portfolio of brands across US and international marketplaces. We are a lean, fast-moving team that runs on clear processes, direct communication, and measurable results. We are not a 50-person agency -- we are a systems-first team that rewards people who own their work and don't need hand-holding. Company name and client details are shared at the interview stage.



THE ROLE

We need a PPC Specialist who can take immediate ownership of 4-6 client accounts on Amazon and Walmart from day one -- auditing, optimizing, scaling, and documenting without close supervision. You will work alongside our PPC Team Lead and report directly to agency leadership. This is a Tier 3 execution role with a documented fast-track path to Tier 4 (Team Lead) based on performance, not tenure.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN



- Full campaign management across Sponsored Products, Brands, Display, and SBV on Amazon

- Walmart Connect campaign management -- setup, optimization, and scaling

- TACOS and profitability-driven bid strategy -- not just ACOS management

- Search term mining, keyword expansion, and match type architecture

- Portfolio structure, budget pacing, and bid cap discipline across 4-6 accounts

- Daily/weekly ClickUp updates with clear rationale on all optimizations

- Participation in SOP development and knowledge sharing





WHAT WE REQUIRE

- 3+ years hands-on Amazon PPC management -- agency experience strongly preferred

- Proven ability to independently manage multiple accounts without close supervision

- Deep understanding of TACOS, contribution margin, and break-even logic -- not just ACOS

- Hands-on experience with SP, SB, SD, and SBV campaign types

- Proficient in Pacvue, Perpetua, Helium 10, DataDive, or comparable platforms

- Walmart Connect experience is a significant plus -- state clearly in your application

- Amazon DSP exposure is a bonus

- ClickUp or equivalent PM tool discipline -- you update, you close, you flag proactively

- Minimum 25 hours/week -- full-time (40 hrs) preferred





NICE TO HAVE

- Multi-marketplace experience (US / EU / UK)

- Experience building or improving PPC SOPs and team processes

- Exposure to AI-assisted workflows or automation tools





HOW WE WORK

- Task ownership in ClickUp -- clear scope, clear deadlines, no chasing required

- Slack for daily visibility and quick team coordination

- No micromanagement -- accountability is built into the process, not managed through it

- 2-week paid trial before full engagement

- Quarterly tier reviews with transparent comp progression





COMPENSATION -- FULL PATH, NO SURPRISES

- Paid trial (2 weeks): $7-8/hr

- Tier 3 base upon hire: $8-9/hr

- Tier 4 lead track at 90 days (performance-triggered): $10-12/hr

- Paid weekly via Wise. Performance bonuses tied to client KPI achievement reviewed quarterly. Advancement is based on documented performance criteria -- not arbitrary decisions.



TO APPLY

Send your resume and a written answer to this question:

You inherit an Amazon account with a TACOS of 24% against a 15% target. What are the first three things you look at and why?



Applications without this answer will not be reviewed. Bullet points are fine. We are evaluating your thinking, not your word count.

title: Remote Architect (2D/3D Design) - UK Projects

About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

This multifaceted role combines architectural design expertise with comprehensive project support and administrative management. The successful candidate will provide essential drafting services, create detailed 3D models and visualizations, while also managing project coordination, supplier relationships, and administrative tasks to ensure seamless project delivery from concept to completion.

 Management: Handle professional
 correspondence and client communications

mbers

What We Offer

title: Editing Quality Manager
description:
Job description:

Editing Quality Manager

Job Type: Full-time

Location: Remote (South Africa based)

Pay: $1,000 – 1,300 per month

Contract: Independent Contractor

About the Role



We are a fast-growing influencer management agency looking for an Editing Quality Manager to own the standard of every piece of edited content that leaves our agency.

Our creators are building real personal brands. Their content is their product, and we need someone who understands that editing isn't just cutting clips together. It's storytelling. It's brand-building. It's the difference between a reel that gets scrolled past and one that makes someone stop, watch, follow, and subscribe.

You'll manage our editing team, raise the quality bar, and make our creators excited to hand over their raw footage because they know it's coming back better than they imagined.



Key Responsibilities

- Review and QA all edited content before it goes live, ensuring it meets brand standards for each individual creator

- Understand that each creator has a unique brand, tone, and visual identity, and ensure edits reflect that rather than a one-size-fits-all template

- Tell a story in 15 to 60 seconds: hook, build, payoff. Every reel should have a reason someone watches to the end

- Directly manage a team of editors, reviewing output daily and giving specific, actionable feedback

- Build editing SOPs, style guides, and brand books per creator so editors have clear direction

- Train editors to understand why something works, not just how to cut it. Develop their eye for hooks, pacing, transitions, and platform-native trends

- Identify when an editor isn't improving and escalate or replace. Do not let bad work keep shipping

- Understand that every edit serves a marketing objective: grow followers, drive clicks, convert subscribers

- Stay current with what's trending on Instagram Reels and TikTok and make sure our editing style stays ahead

- Work with the Creative Director to translate content briefs into editing specs that get executed properly

- Review content performance data weekly and connect editing decisions to real metrics

- Jump in and edit when a high-priority piece needs your touch or the team is behind



You Will Thrive Here If

- You have managed editors before and have raised a team's output quality, not just maintained it

- You understand social media content as a product, not an art project. Every edit has a job to do

- You have a sharp eye for what makes short-form content work: hooks, pacing, visual storytelling, platform trends

- You can give direct, specific feedback without being vague

- You understand brand identity and can ensure multiple creators each have a distinct visual feel

- You are comfortable in a fast-paced agency where high volumes of content ship weekly

- You can manage remote tea
mbers across time zones, track output, and hold people accountable



Required Skills

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, CapCut, or equivalent short-form editing tools

- Strong understanding of Instagram Reels, TikTok, and short-form content formats

- Experience managing or leading a team of editors (not just editing solo)

- Understanding of social media marketing fundamentals: funnels, engagement, conversion

- Ability to create and maintain style guides and editing SOPs

- Excellent communication in English



Experience Required

- Video editing: 5 years (required)

- Team or people management: 3 years (required)

- Social media content: 3 years (required)



Compensation

- $1,000 – 1,300 per month depending on experience

- Performance bonus tied to content quality scores and creator satisfaction, unlocks after probation

- Growth path into Head of Post-Production as the agency scales



How to Apply

IMPORTANT: Please apply through the link below.



If you meet the requirements, kindly complete the application form here:


/
/f/2kz0ma3h-3936/E5Y8NT9JQFSUANFWUL



A 2–5 minute video answering the pre-screening questions. When recording, please speak clearly and concisely, focusing on specific examples and measurable outcomes.



Pre-Screening Questions:



1. Please provide your WhatsApp number (including country code).

2. Share or describe a piece of content you’ve edited that you’re most proud of. What made it successful?

3. What is the maximum number of editors you have managed at one time?

4. Which editing tools do you use on a daily basis?

title: HR Generalist for a Pharmaceutical Com. 2 positions
description:
Job Summary



The HR Generalist is a full WFH role for a Pharmaceutical Company, they will be responsible for managing day-to-day human resources operations, supporting the full employee lifecycle, and ensuring compliance with company policies and labor regulations. This role will work closely with leadership and functional teams to support organizational growth, employee engagement, and a high-performance culture. We are looking for someone that has done HR work for US Healthcare accounts.



Key Responsibilities

1. Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

Manage end-to-end recruitment for clinical, regulatory, and corporate roles

Coordinate job postings, screening, interviews, and offer processes

Partner with hiring managers to understand workforce needs

2. Employee Lifecycle Management

Oversee onboarding and induction programs

Maintain accurate employee records and HRIS data

Support employee offboarding and exit processes

3. Employee Relations

Act as a point of contact for employee concerns and HR queries

Handle disciplinary actions, grievances, and conflict resolution

Promote a positive and compliant workplace environment

4. Performance & Development

Support performance review cycles and goal setting

Coordinate training and development initiatives

Identify skill gaps and recommend learning programs

5. Compensation & Benefits

Assist in payroll coordination and benefits administration

Support compensation reviews and employee rewards programs

6. Compliance & HR Policies

Ensure compliance with labor laws and company policies

Maintain and update HR policies, SOPs, and documentation

Support audits and regulatory requirements (important in clinical/life sciences sector)

7. HR Reporting & Analytics

Track HR metrics such as turnover, hiring timelines, and engagement

Generate reports for management decision-making

Qualifications & Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field

2–5 years of experience as an HR Generalist or similar role

Experience in life sciences, CRO, healthcare, or pharma industry is a strong advantage

Knowledge of labor laws and HR best practices

Familiarity with HR systems and recruitment tools

Strong communication, problem-solving, and organizational skills



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview. Please have a summary of your experience in your cover letter or body of
.

title: Senior Sales Director – Revenue Operations & AI Systems
description:
Senior Sales Director – Revenue Operations & AI Systems



Remote (Philippines-Based) | Leadership Role | AI-First Company



Compensation & Growth

 • $10–$15 USD/hour to start (based on experience)

 • Performance-based raises

 • Bonuses and incentives based on:

 • Revenue growth

 • Sales pipeline performance

 • Close-rate improvements

 • Automation and system improvements

 • Team performance and execution quality

 • Long-term growth opportunity into Head of Revenue / Revenue Operations Lead as the company scales



This is a career-track leadership role, not a basic VA position. High performers will gain expanded responsibility, authority, and income as the business grows.



?



About the Company



We are a fast-growing, AI-first company serving clients in the U.S. market.

We use AI and automation daily across:

 • Sales

 • Marketing

 • Operations

 • Client communication

 • Reporting and decision-making



You will gain hands-on experience building and running real AI-powered sales systems for a U.S.-based business. This role is ideal for experienced professionals in the Philippines who want long-term growth, global exposure, and leadership responsibility.



?



Role Summary



We are hiring a Senior Sales Director / Revenue Operations Lead to take ownership of our entire sales execution system. This includes:

 • Managing inside sales and appointment setters

 • Owning CRM systems and automation

 • Improving AI-powered workflows

 • Driving pipeline performance and revenue results



You will not just “support” sales — you will run the sales engine.

If there are issues with follow-up, CRM data, automation, pipeline flow, or reporting — you are expected to lead the fix.



?



Required Experience (Please Do Not Apply If You Do Not Meet These)

 • 5+ years of experience in B2B sales, sales operations, or revenue operations

 • 3+ years managing sales teams (inside sales, SDRs, appointment setters, or closers)

 • 2–3+ years hands-on experience managing a CRM (GoHighLevel experience is a strong plus)

 • Experience building or improving sales automations and workflows

 • Comfortable working in a startup or fast-changing environment

 • Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)



This role is for senior-level operators, not entry-level applicants.



?



AI & Technology Requirements



You must already be comfortable using:

 • ChatGPT for work (daily use)

 • Google Gemini or similar AI tools

 • CRM systems and cloud-based tools

 • AI-assisted reporting and workflow automation



Nice to have (strong advantage):

 • Experience with AI voice or SMS agents

 • Automation tools like Zapier, Make, or n8n

 • Prompt writing for business workflows



You don’t need to be a developer, but you must be comfortable working with AI tools and automation daily.



?



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales & Revenue Execution

 • Own lead intake, follow-up systems, appointment setting, and pipeline movement

 • Improve speed-to-lead and contact rates

 • Analyze lost deals and improve conversion

 • Ensure revenue targets are met consistently



2. Inside Sales Team Leadership

 • Hire, train, and manage inside sales reps and appointment setters

 • Set daily activity KPIs (calls, SMS,
)

 • Review call recordings and improve scripts

 • Coach underperformers and build strong performers



3. CRM & Automation Ownership (GoHighLevel or Similar)

 • Maintain clean, accurate pipelines

 • Manage automations for follow-ups, tasks, and routing

 • Ensure reporting accuracy for management

 • Continuously improve sales workflows



4. AI & Process Improvement

 • Use AI to improve scripts, follow-ups, reporting, and summaries

 • Help deploy AI tools into sales workflows

 • Think in terms of systems and processes, not just tasks



5. Funnel & Lead Quality Improvement

 • Identify where leads drop off

 • Work with marketing to improve lead quality and conversion

 • Improve landing page messaging and follow-up flows



6. Reporting & Communication

 • Provide daily visibility on pipeline health

 • Weekly performance summaries

 • Proactively raise issues before they become problems



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Clean and accurate CRM

 • Predictable sales pipeline

 • Strong follow-up discipline across the team

 • Stable inside sales performance

 • Revenue growth with fewer emergencies

 • A sales system that runs smoothly without constant intervention



?



Who This Role Is For



This role is ideal for:

 • Experienced sales managers or revenue operations leaders in the Philippines

 • Professionals who want long-term career growth in a U.S.-based company

 • Leaders who enjoy building systems, managing people, and improving performance

 • Candidates excited to work with AI, automation, and modern sales tech



?



This Role Is NOT For

 • Entry-level applicants

 • General VAs

 • Candidates who prefer task-only support roles

 • People uncomfortable with accountability or performance metrics

 • Applicants who are not interested in learning and using AI tools

title: Senior RFP Director – High-Stakes B2B & Government Contracts
description:
Pay: ?8,890.50 - ?10,000.00 per week



Job description:



Senior RFP Director – High-Stakes B2B & Government Contracts



Remote (Philippines Preferred) | Pay-for-Wins | Zero Babysitting | AI-Driven



Compensation Structure (Read Carefully)



No submissions = no base pay.



This role is performance-leveraged by design._ Compensation is tied directly to execution quality and wins — not hours logged._



1. Base Pay – Per Submission



$120–$300 USD per completed RFP submission

Final rate depends on:

Complexity

Length

Compliance burden

Portal and formatting requirements

Paid per submission, not per hour

This base covers:



RFP analysis

Compliance mapping

Proposal drafting and assembly

Submission execution

No submissions = no base pay.



2. Win Commission (Primary Upside)



1%–3% commission on awarded contract value

Paid per deal won

Commission tier based on:

Deal size

Complexity

Margin health

Level of autonomy required

Examples:



$250,000 annual contract ? $2,500–$7,500 payout

$1M+ multi-site or multi-year deal ? significant upside

You win deals. You get paid.



3. Performance Multipliers (Top Performers Only)



Additional bonuses for:



Government contract wins

Multi-location or multi-site awards

Zero-revision submissions

Margin-protected pricing

Competitive takeaways

Top performers earn more per RFP, not just more volume.



4. Protection Clauses (Important)



You are not penalized for:



Smart no-bid recommendations

Client-side delays

Sales-side execution failures

Losses due to pricing decisions outside your control

You are evaluated on process quality, judgment, and execution discipline — not blind win rates.



Company Context (Non-Negotiable)



We operate in compliance-heavy, high-risk B2B environments, including government and regulated industries.



Bad RFPs:



Destroy margins

Create legal exposure

Drain operations

Waste payroll

AI is embedded into:



Requirement extraction

Drafting and summarization

Compliance validation

Post-mortems

Proposal libraries

If you are not already using AI daily to work faster, cleaner, and smarter, this role is not a fit.



Role Summary



You are the single owner of the RFP system.



This is not an assistant role.

This is not a coordinator role.



You d
:



What we bid

What we skip

How we respond

When leadership is involved

If an RFP is late, sloppy, risky, or should not have been submitted — that’s on you.



Minimum Experience Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



You must have:



5+ years of direct RFP ownership

Experience with government, enterprise, or regulated B2B contracts

Proven history of:

Go / no-go decision-making

Compliance matrices and requirement tracking

Contract and risk review

Multi-stakeholder coordination

Experience working closely with sales, operations, and leadership

Exposure to founder-led or high-accountability environments

No juniors.

No “support-only” backgrounds.



AI & Tooling Requirements (Mandatory)



You must already be fluent in:



ChatGPT (analysis, drafting, summarization)

AI-assisted requirement extraction

Google Docs and Sheets (advanced usage)

Cloud-based collaboration workflows

Strong preference for experience with:



Prompt engineering for proposals

AI compliance validation tools

RFP tracking systems

CRM- or Notion-based workflows

AI assists speed — you own accuracy.



Core Responsibilities1. RFP Intake & Go / No-Go Authority



Log and track all inbound RFPs

Extract requirements and scoring criteria

Flag risks early

Make decisive bid / no-bid recommendations

Submitting bad RFPs is failure.



2. Compliance & Risk Control



Build and maintain compliance matrices

Track every requirement to completion

Identify legal, insurance, and operational risks

Escalate early — never late

Missed requirements = disqualification.



3. Proposal Writing & Assembly



Own narrative quality and clarity

Eliminate generic filler

Align responses to evaluation criteria

Use AI intelligently, not blindly

This is executive-level business writing.



4. Pricing Coordination & Margin Protection



Coordinate pricing inputs across teams

Flag underpriced or dangerous bids

Refuse to submit margin-killing proposals

Winning bad deals is not success.



5. Submission Control



Own portals, formatting, deadlines, and confirmations

Ensure complete, compliant, and on-time delivery

Late = dead. No excuses.



6. Win / Loss Intelligence



Track outcomes and feedback

Build and maintain a proposal language library

Apply lessons learned to future submissions

Every RFP strengthens the system.



KPIs (Strictly Enforced)



On-time submission rate

Compliance accuracy

Reduction in executive revisions

Go / no-go decision quality

Win rate on right-fit bids

Margin health on awarded contracts

What Will Get You Fired Quickly



Missed requirements

Late submissions

Sloppy or unchecked AI output

Hiding or downplaying risk

Saying yes to bad bids

Needing constant reminders

What Success Looks Like



Clean, compliant submissions

Faster turnaround times

Higher win rates on fewer, better bids

Strong leadership trust

Real commission checks

This Role Is NOT For



Junior proposal writers

Hourly-only thinkers

People afraid to say no

Anyone needing step-by-step supervision

“AI tourists”

Job Type: Full-time

title: Operations Lead for Revenue Growth & Monetization
description:
We're looking for an Operations Lead to own and scale the revenue engine across our creator portfolio.



This is not a traditional marketing role. This is for a hands-on operator who owns messaging, offers, and conversion — and is accountable for revenue outcomes.



You won’t be handling repetitive execution. You’ll design the systems and also directly improve messaging, offers, and conversion. This is a hands-on role. You will be directly responsible for improving conversion through messaging, offers, and sequences — not just managing a team. If you haven’t personally improved conversion by rewriting messaging, offers, or sequences — this role is not for you.



Your success is measured by one thing: revenue growth.



Work Setup: Fully remote



Reports to: Head of Sales



Key Responsibilities



What You’ll Own



1. Conversion Systems

Write, test, and iterate messaging, offers, and sequences

Increase conversion and retention through continuous experimentation

Identify winning approaches and scale them across the portfolio



2. Messaging & Monetization

Own the structure, cadence, and performance of messaging across creators

Optimize monetization strategies including pricing, upsells, and offers

Ensure consistency and performance in all revenue-driving campaigns



3. Lifecycle Marketing

Build and refine welcome flows, re-engagement campaigns, re-subscription flows, and win-back strategies

Improve customer lifetime value through structured messaging sequences

4. Performance Optimization



Track conversion metrics and identify gaps

Continuously improve pricing, offers, and messaging based on data

Implement A/B testing and iterative improvements

5. Team Leadership



Lead and manage a team of VAs or operations specialists

Translate strategy into actionable plans executed with speed and quality

Ensure team alignment and accountability

Who You Are



1. Hands-On Revenue Operator



You personally own messaging, offers, and conversion results.



2. Systems Thinker



You design scalable frameworks and structured processes, not just individual messages.



3. Data-Driven Operator



You analyze metrics to identify problems and make decisions. Gut feel is always backed by data.



4. Ownership Mentality



You take responsibility for outcomes, not just execution. Results are your accountability.



Relevant Experience



Background in high-volume digital sales, e-commerce, or direct response marketing

Experience improving conversion through offers, sequences, or funnel optimization

Creator or subscription-based experience is a plus (not required)

Why Join Us



Direct impact on revenue and business growth

Freedom to design and optimize systems

Leadership responsibility with measurable outcomes

High upside for high performers

How to Apply



IMPORTANT: Please apply through the link below.



If you meet the requirements, kindly complete the application form here:




/
/f/2kz0ma3h-3936/E5Y8NT9JQFSUANFWUL



A 2–5 minute video answering the pre-screening questions. When recording, please speak clearly and concisely, focusing on specific examples and measurable outcomes.

Pre-screening Questions:



1. Conversion Experience:



Describe a specific instance where you directly improved conversion, sales, or revenue through messaging, offers, or funnel optimization. What changes did you make, and what were the results?



2. Systems & Strategy:



How do you approach designing a messaging or monetization system for a portfolio of creators or products? Can you give an example of a system you built that scaled effectively?



3. Data-Driven Decision Making:



Tell us about a time you used metrics to identify a problem in a sales or marketing process. What data did you track, what insight did you discover, and what actions did you take?



Qualified candidates will be fast-tracked to a performance-focused interview process.

title: Operations & Account Manager – Security Services
description:
Operations & Account Manager – Security Services



Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST + On-Call Availability



Pay & Growth

 • $6–$10 USD/hour to start (based on experience)

 • Performance-based increases

 • Long-term growth into Senior Operations Manager / Account Management Lead



?



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based security services company managing multiple client accounts and field security teams.

This role focuses on day-to-day operations management and client account support to ensure services are delivered correctly, issues are handled quickly, and client relationships remain strong.



You will work closely with:

 • Clients

 • Field guards and supervisors

 • Dispatch and internal teams

 • Management



This is a hands-on operations and account management role with real ownership and growth potential.



?



Work Schedule (Important)

 • Primary shift: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PST)

 • On-call availability: You must be reachable outside normal hours for urgent operational or client issues.

 • Security operations run 24/7, so occasional after-hours support is part of the role.



Please apply only if you can work U.S. Pacific Time hours and be on-call when needed.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Manage assigned client accounts and day-to-day service delivery

 • Act as a point of contact for client questions, requests, and concerns

 • Coordinate with field guards and supervisors to ensure proper coverage

 • Monitor attendance, call-offs, and shift changes

 • Track and resolve service issues using CRM/ticketing systems

 • Follow up to ensure problems are fully resolved

 • Maintain accurate records for client sites, guards, and i

 • Support operational improvements and process updates



You are expected to own your accounts and operations, not just pass tasks along.



?



What We’re Looking For

 • 2+ years experience in operations management, account management, customer success, dispatch, or service coordination

 • Experience supporting field teams (security, logistics, delivery, facilities, etc. is a plus)

 • Strong English communication skills

 • Organized, reliable, and able to manage multiple accounts or tasks

 • Comfortable handling urgent or time-sensitive issues

 • Experience with CRMs, ticketing tools, or workforce management systems (or willingness to learn)



?



Nice to Have

 • Background in security services or similar 24/7 operations

 • Experience working with U.S.-based clients

 • Familiarity with GoHighLevel or similar platforms



?



What Success Looks Like

 • Clients feel supported and confident in service quality

 • Fewer missed shifts and coverage gaps

 • Faster resolution of operational issues

 • Clean, up-to-date account records

 • Reduced escalations over time



?



Who This Role Is For

 • Operations coordinators or managers

 • Account managers or client success specialists

 • Dispatchers or service coordinators ready for more responsibility

 • Professionals who want long-term growth in operations and account leadership



?



Not a Fit If You

 • Cannot work PST hours

 • Want fixed hours with no on-call responsibility

 • Prefer admin-only roles

 • Are uncomfortable handling urgent client or field issues



?



How to Apply



Please include:

 • A brief summary of your operations or account management experience

 • Any experience working with field teams or client accounts

 • The systems or tools you’ve used

 • Confirmation of availability for 9 AM – 5 PM PST + on-call support

title: Office Assistant with Microsoft Excel MASTERY
description:
Established in 1984, PTFS, LLC is a commercial services company headquartered in Houston TX. Some of our clients have been longstanding customers of ours for over 40 years. We are extremely data driven and we use Excel heavily for most of our data metrics. 



We are in process of building a fully remote team in the PH which will eventually take over all US based operations. We are looking for tea
mbers LONG TERM. We value loyalty and tenure-ship and most importantly, availability. We would like all of the tea

mber will go through the process of performance review determining promotion / increase in compensation. The metrics we use are:



- Improved understanding of company processes 

- Thoroughness & speed in taking proper actions 

- Frequency of errors / how individual has corrected them

- New responsibilities assumed since hire

- Dependency & Availability

- Does the individual go above & beyond?
