Our line of work is very fast paced with ever-changing requests from clients. Schedules are set but can change at any given 
nt. It is important for tea
mbers to understand what needs to be done when a sudden change is requested by a customer as there are field workers who are dependent on the office to communicate such changes.  As a tea
mber, we need you to be versatile, stepping up or filling in at any given 
nt if another tea
mber is busy or unavailable. Thus, we don't have a separation of duties. Each tea

s

title: Supply Chain VA — Dropshipping / Shopify (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Hi! We are Ecomhit, a Dutch e-commerce company running multiple Shopify dropshipping stores across Europe. We are growing fast and looking for a Supply Chain VA to join our remote team full-time.



This is a long-term role. We are not looking for someone to do a quick project. We want someone who grows with us.





ABOUT THE ROLE



You will be responsible for making sure every product in our catalog has a good supplier, a fair price, and good product quality. We test hundreds of new products every week, and every product needs to be sourced correctly before it goes live.



Your day-to-day will look like this:

- Review supplier quotes for new products every day

- Evaluate product quality based on supplier photos and specs

- Chat with suppliers in English to request information, negotiate, or follow up

- Draft products that have no good supplier available

- Monitor product quality based on customer feedback and refund data

- Take action when something is wrong — without waiting to be told





WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU



English communication is the #1 requirement. You will be on weekly video calls with us and chatting with suppliers in English every single day. If your English is not strong, this role is not for you.



You need to be a fast learner. Our platform is not something anyone has used before, we will train you. But we need someone who picks things up quickly and does not need everything explained over and over.



You need to be decisive. We run a big operation. We cannot be involved in every small decision. If a product has no good supplier, you draft it and move on. You do not ask us what to do for every single product. We trust you to handle it.



Experience with dropshipping fulfillment is a big plus — CJ Dropshipping, DSers, AutoDS, Zendrop, or anything similar. If you have worked in e-commerce supply chain before, tell us about it.





PRACTICAL DETAILS



- Full-time: 40 hours per week

- Monday to Friday

- Must be responsive during European business hours (CET)

- Reliable internet and professional work setup required

- Starting rate: $5-6/hr depending on experience, with room to grow





HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic application. We read every message carefully.



Please answer these three questions:



1. What e-commerce or dropshipping tools have you worked with? Be specific.

2. Tell us about a time you had to make a decision at work without asking your employer first. What was the situation and what did you d
?

3. Record a short video (1-2 minutes) in English introducing yourself and explaining why you are a good fit for this role. Send the link (Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube unlisted).



Applications without a video will not be considered. This is non-negotiable.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: AI Ad Script Generation Job For E-commerce Brand (Full-time)
description:
Job Overview

We’re looking to hire a full-time Junior Creative Strategist to simply copy winning ad scripts in our niche using AI tools and our own training. You’ll be doing daily research on brands in our niche and copying their ads using simple AI prompts you come up with. 



About Us

We’re an e-commerce holding company primarily in health and beauty, selling supplements. Unlike other job listings, you’ll be working with us for a long time most likely, since we run actual longterm health brands and not dropship products like others.



Your Core Responsibilities

- Daily research of other brands on the ads library and angle ideas

- Produce a consistent 5-10+ scripts per work day (using AI, I will provide SOPs showing how I get 40 done per day). 

- Doing weekly learnings on our winning ads and understanding why they did well (hooks, avatars, angles)

- Studying courses & programs on creative strategy & copywriting that I give you

- Understanding the customers' pain points better than they do, this can be done through research on Reddit, Quora, TikTok, Grok, and more. You’ll be using these to come up with new angles and develop your research papers on our product(s) even more.



What to Expect

- A simple, not easy job. All the heavy lifting will be provided to you in the training SOP, including where and how to conduct research. The only thing you’ll need to do yourself is generate prompts.

- Flexible working hours, we may send you an ad at 5 am. I’d expect you to work on it whenever you’re available

- Focus on quality scripts and not quantity. A quality script has an intent behind it, with engaging hooks that spark curiosity. AI will often repeat a lot of the same hooks and styles, so you’ll have to use a platform like Grok or your own writing to fix it.



What you need

- Good internet speed

- AI tools like Claude, Grok, and Gemini (will all be paid and provided to you in the future)

- Good English understanding 

- Follow social media trending concepts, for example, animated cartoon ads

- IMPORTANT: Time! This isn’t a side hustle or a free ride. The job is very simple and has potential for high pay, but we only want people who will be working with us, and nobody else.



How to get the job?

1. Send us your resume/experience, including your English reading/understanding level (from 1 - 10, with 10 being perfect).

2. We’ll send you our brand & product details 

3. We’ll then give you an example of a winning ad from another brand and ask you to create a new one for our brand + angle using your own prompt

4. We’ll review it, and if it’s good, we’ll hire you right away.

title: AI Senior Video Editor for 7 figure supplement brands (Sora 2, Kling, Heygen, and more).
description:
*IMPORTANT* This is a premium post for experienced editors with intermediate/expert knowledge of AI generation for advertisements. AI is evolving everyday so we need someone who’s CONSTANTLY learning. Please read the post in its entirety, only top tier applicants will be considered. 





Job Description:

Position: Senior Video Editor

Type: Remote, Long-Term High-Volume Contract

Compensation: This is a high-paying opportunity based on a consistent, high-volume workload. The fixed rate is $10-$20 USD (flexible) per 2-5 minute video with options for bonuses in future possible depending on the quality of the videos.



If you can’t make AI B-Roll and fast pace editing like this, THIS JOB IS NOT FOR YOU. Here’s an example of various ad formats we use:


 



WHO ARE WE?

Hello everyone, 

I’m the CEO & founder of a fast growing direct response E-commerce holding company, currently doing $1mm per month with our own in-house supplement brands that we started from scratch. 



We’re looking to hire a Senior video editor who can bring our visions for creatives to life, specifically using realistic style AI to generate content using tools such as Sora 2, Veo 3, Kling, Higgsfield or others… an example of an ad generated with full Sora AI B-roll is this here: 
 


 

The majority of the video is generated here with AI b-roll in order to bring the story to life. We will provide you with any tools you need but ideally we’d want someone very knowledgeable with AI and Sora video generation as that’s what seems to be performing the best. 



We want someone who’ll be constantly curious on how to edit and increase their skills as a whole. This won’t be as simple as just editing videos since you will be essentially generating B-roll for these personal stories yourself. 



This is a role with real growth potential and longevity for someone looking to grow their skills in a healthy work environment. With potential to evolve into a senior creative operations leader earning above market. We value creativity and will reward people who grow with the company. 





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU?

- Unlimited growth opportunity without pay ceiling 

- Long term work, unlike most dropshippers & e-commerce brand owners, all of our brands are long term with subscriptions where we intend for them to be around forever. So you’ll always have work with us in our ecosystem and we’ll only grow more from here. 

- $15,000+ worth of training material and SOPs from various programs like ecomtalent, evolve, advertorial mastery, VSL masterclass and more… 



WHAT WE EXPECT?

- High Output: We scale fast so no “free riders” or 9-5 mindsets for this job role, payment is per video.

- Quality over Quantity: We expect consistent production of ads, we’re fine with giving extended times for production but we need you to make up for delays in quality,

- Curiosity & personal growth *IMPORTANT*: We want you to consistently be looking at ads from competitors and other top brands in the niche. At the company we go by a motto of “sharpening your sword” with consistent work to become the best. 



HOW TO APPLY? (via. onlinejobs)

Step 1. Send me videos you’ve made in the past utilizing AI

Step 2. Send me videos of clips/b-rolls you’ve generated using AI, for example: 
 

Step 3. Send me the hours & days you’re available for editing and if you have any other jobs you’re doing currently



FINAL Step, If your resume seems good, we will ask for a PAID sample to confirm your skills. The payment for the sample will be added to your first paycheck (next Friday, then every 2 weeks). 



Thank you for reading this application, I look forward to working with the best of the best!

Cheers

title: Web & Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a reliable part-time web & graphic designer to join our web agency. Current tasks have to do with branding, brand guide creation, website UX audits, website design creation, document design creation.



Requirements:

- Strong English

- Strong skills in web and graphic design

- Proficient with Figma

- Good eye for clean, professional, and modern design

- Good eye for spotting design inconsistencies

- Good attention to small details

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

- Ability to work closely with project managers, including on Teams calls

- Portfolio with web + graphic design samples (required)



Details:

- Part-time to start, depending on availability of work

- Transition into a full-time position in about 4 to 6 weeks for the right designer

- Title your application: Designer 

- Fully remote (work from anywhere)



If you are a creative, fast learner with good English communication and can deliver quality work consistently, please apply with your design portfolio and tell us:



- Your hourly rate expectation

- Your availability per week



Only serious applicants with relevant experience and a portfolio will be considered. Title the application "Web + Graphic Designer Application" (I will skip applications that are not titled this).

title: Funnel Builder – eCommerce (Beauty/Wellness Niche)
description:
NOW HIRING: eCommerce Funnel Builder – Health & Beauty Industry





Are you ready to elevate your skills and make a real impact with a fast-growing Beauty & Health eCommerce brand? We’re looking for a hands-on Funnel Builder who can build and optimize high-converting sales funnels using Funnelish.



You’ll play a key role in shaping our customer journey, ensuring every funnel is strategically designed to drive performance. Plus, earning up to $100 bonus per funnel, your hard work directly translates into extra earnings!





Your Role:

-Build, test, and refine funnels to improve user experience and conversions

-Create effective funnels using Funnelish, aligned with KPIs

-Troubleshoot issues quickly and independently

- Regular analysis and tweaking of funnels based on performance data.

-Earn up to $100 in bonuses per funnel that meets performance benchmarks





What We’re Looking For:

-Proven experience in funnel building, using Funnelish

-Background in eCommerce, preferably dropshipping

-Strong problem-solving skills and ability to manage multiple projects

-Ability to implement solutions quickly and with minimal supervision

-Clear communicator and strong team player



How to Apply:

To apply, please send your portfolio showcasing relevant funnel-building work.

To confirm your attention to detail, include the color turquoise a in your application.





To be considered, please answer the following:

How much time do you typically spend building an advertorial page and a sales page in these two scenarios:

1. From scratch

2. Using a template

Include your estimated time for each, and briefly explain your process.

Tell me in detail about your usage and experience with Funnelish.



Ready to embark on this exciting journey with us? Apply today and be a part of our growth and success!

title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
NOTE: Applicants who followed instructions will be contacted right away. We are hiring immediately.



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian e-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.

title: Online Content Coordinator
description:
Trendstop is a leading fashion and lifestyle trend forecasting agency based in London, delivering insight and trend forecasting content that helps brands plan future products and marketing.

We are looking for a detail-driven Online Content Coordinator to take ownership of how our content is organized, managed and published across digital platforms.



This is a hands-on role at the heart of our content operation. You’ll ensure everything we produce, from editorial stories to visual assets, is accurately published, beautifully presented and delivered seamlessly. We have remote tea
mbers based in London/Europe and in the Philippines.



If you are someone who enjoys structure, clarity and making systems run smoothly, and you’re confident working with CMS platforms and digital tools, this role is for you.



What you’ll be doing



Content coordination

You’ll manage the day-to-day flow of content across our editorial pipeline.

• Coordinate writers, designers and contributors 

• Track deadlines and keep projects moving 

• Prepare clear briefs, templates and instructions 

• Ensure everyone has the right assets at the right time 



Editing & quality control

You’ll make sure everything we publish meets a high standard.

• Review content for clarity, consistency and tone 

• Align copy with visuals and overall structure 

• Check text, images, links and metadata before publishing 

• Provide clear feedback and final approvals 



CMS & digital publishing

You’ll own the publishing process end-to-end.

• Upload and format content in our CMS 

• Apply tagging, categorization and structure 

• Ensure content displays correctly across devices 

• Troubleshoot layout or formatting issues 

• Manage updates and post-publication edits 



Asset & content organization

You’ll bring order to our content systems.

• Organize image libraries, folders and digital assets 

• Maintain naming conventions and tagging systems 

• Manage version control across content files 

• Ensure assets are easy to find and ready to use 



Remote workflow coordination

You’ll help keep distributed teams aligned and efficient.

• Guide contributors on tools, CMS processes and file handling 

• Monitor output quality and consistency 

• Maintain clear communication across teams 

• Support onboarding into workflows and systems 



What success looks like

• Content is published on time, error-free and well formatted 

• CMS workflows are smooth, structured and reliable 

• Digital content is clear, consistent and user-friendly 

• Assets are organized and easy to locate 

• Teams feel supported, aligned and efficient 



What we’re looking for

• Strong CMS experience with online content management tools 

• A digital-first mindset, you understand how content works online 

• Excellent attention to detail and proofreading skills 

• Experience coordinating content, workflows or contributors 

• Confidence using digital tools, platforms and evolving systems 

• Highly organized with strong file and asset management skills 

• Clear, professional communication in a remote environment 



Why join Trendstop?

• Be at the center of a fast-moving digital content operation 

• Shape and improve how content is published and managed 

• Work with a creative, globally distributed team 

• Flexible, remote-first working environment 

• Competitive compensation aligned with experience 



We’d love to welcome you into our trend-focused, creative and collaborative team, where great content is built through strong systems, attention to detail and teamwork.



Location: Remote

Type: Full-time contractor or minimum 4 hours daily with UK hours overlap

Start: ASAP / within 4 weeks



To Apply

Please include your CV, covering letter, any relevant work examples and your hourly rate.to

title: UX/UI Designer - Aus Start Up
description:
About Tradelance



Tradelance is building a modern technology platform that connects tradespeople and homeowners across Australia, with plans to expand into New Zealand as the platform grows.



The platform combines a contractor marketplace with a social-style feed where users can post jobs, hire tradies, and share work with the community.



We are currently in the final stages of testing our launch-ready product and are looking for a UX/UI Designer to help refine and improve the platform.



Responsibilities



Improve the current platform UX/UI

Identify edge cases and improve user flows

Refine the social feed experience

Design new screens and product features

Ensure all pages follow consistent branding and design standards

Work with developers to ensure designs are implemented correctly



You will also help design the next phase of Tradelance as we plan the transition to a future custom coded platform.



Required Skills



Strong UX/UI design experience

Advanced Figma skills

Experience designing web and mobile platforms

Understanding of user flows and modern UI design

Experience working with developers



This is not a fixed hour position at the 
nt some weeks it will be 10 hours some will be 20.

title: Finance Administrator & Bookkeeper
description:
About the Role

We are a small, high-performing travel agency based in New Zealand. We are looking for a highly disciplined Financial Administrator & Bookkeeping Specialist to join our tight-knit team. This is a critical role responsible for the financial integrity of the business, requiring a mix of traditional bookkeeping and a passion for data automation.



The Details



Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM NZST (5:00 AM – 1:00 PM PHT).

Holidays: New Zealand Public Holidays observed (Off work) + 2 week Christmas shutdown

Location: 100% Remote (Philippines-based).

Bonus: 13th Month Payment in December.



Key Responsibilities



Daily bank, credit card, and GST reconciliation (Xero).

Weekly IATA BSP and Air Supplier reconciliation using PowerSuite.

Building and maintaining reporting dashboards (Microsoft PowerBI).

Setting up supplier and payroll administration.

Auditing agent costings and commission to ensure margin accuracy.

Proactively identifying and implementing automations to reduce manual data entry.

Assist with other administrative tasks as required by the business



Technical Requirements



Required: High proficiency in Xero, Excel, Microsoft PowerBI and other Microsoft Suite of products.

AI Tools: Some experience using Microsoft CoPilot or similar tools for data analysis.

Hardware Requirement: Reliable high speed internet, modern and secure home office setup. Reliable noise cancelling headset (e.g. Jabra Evolve 65)

Preferred but not required: Experience with IATA BSP reconciliation and Travel Mid office systems (e.g., PowerSuite, Tramada, or TRES).



Why Join North Travel?



Culture: We are a flat-hierarchy with family vibes. We are a "hit the ground running" team where your initiative is expected and valued.

Travel Opportunity: High performers will earn the opportunity to travel to New Zealand with expenses paid to attend our conferences.

Health & Wealth: NZD $40 monthly gym/wellness subsidy and 13th-month payment in December.

title: Lead Generation & Outreach Campaign Manager (MedTech Focus)
description:
We help medical device companies create IFU-style videos and 3D animations that show how their device works on the body so clinicians understand it faster.



We’re looking for someone who can identify the right people inside these companies and run outbound campaigns that generate real conversations.



This is not just a VA role.

This is about thinking, targeting, and executing campaigns properly.



What you’ll be doing

Define and refine ICPs for different campaigns

Use LinkedIn Sales Navigator to find and filter decision-makers (product, clinical, marketing, regulatory)

Build clean, targeted lead lists (not generic scraping)

Launch LinkedIn campaigns using HeyReach (or similar tools)

Run
 outreach campaigns using Instantly (or similar tools)

Write or adapt short, direct outreach messages

Track replies and improve targeting and messaging

What matters most

You know how to find the right people, not just pull lists

You understand ICP, segmentation, and targeting

You can explain why you chose a specific audience

You’ve actually run campaigns end-to-end

Requirements

Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator (must)

Experience with HeyReach or similar LinkedIn tools (must)

Experience with Instantly or similar
 tools (preferred)

Strong understanding of outbound campaigns

Good written English

To apply (mandatory – read carefully)



Answer all questions clearly. Skipping = automatic rejection.



1. ICP thinking (core skill)

How would you define an ICP for our service (IFU videos for medical device companies)? Be specific.



2. Real targeting task (important)

Describe step-by-step how you would build a list using Sales Navigator for this campaign. Include:



filters you would use

job titles

company size

keywords



3. Tool experience

Which of these have you used and how:



LinkedIn Sales Navigator

HeyReach (or similar)

Instantly (or similar
 tools)



Be specific.



4. Campaign execution

Walk me through how you would launch a campaign from start to finish.

From list building ? messaging ? sending ? follow-ups.



5. Message test (critical)

Write a short first message to a medical device Product Manager.

Keep it under 3 lines.



6. Problem solving

If a campaign gets low replies, what do you check first and why?



7. Attention to detail (important)

At the top of your application, write: ICP first, tools second



8. Availability

Confirm your working hours in UK time.



Bonus (optional but recommended)



Share one campaign you worked on and what results you got.



Important



If your experience is mainly data entry or basic VA work, this is not a fit.



We’re looking for someone who can think, d
, and execute campaigns that get replies.

title: COPY EDITOR — English-Language Nonfiction Books
description:
Nova Ars Vivendi is a small independent publishing house producing nonfiction books in philosophy, self-help, and personal development. We are looking for a copy editor to join our editorial pipeline on a part-time, ongoing basis.



What the work involves:



- Copyediting manuscripts of 20,000 to 60,000 words against a provided house style sheet

- Working in Microsoft Word with tracked changes (this is non-negotiable)

- Checking grammar, punctuation, spelling, and consistency

- Enforcing a specific banned words and patterns list (provided)

- Flagging anything that reads as generic, repetitive, or machine-written

- Maintaining the author's voice — tightening prose without flattening it

- Delivering tracked changes file, clean copy, and brief editorial notes



What we need from you:



- Native or near-native English proficiency (C2 level)

- At least 3 years of professional copyediting experience on books or long-form manuscripts (not blog posts, not SEO content, not social media)

- Familiarity with the Chicago Manual of Style (CMOS)

- Comfortable working in both US English and British English (Oxford spelling)

- Ability to follow a detailed style sheet precisely

- Reliable delivery within agreed deadlines



What we do not need:



- Content writing, ghostwriting, or rewriting

- SEO, social media management, or marketing

- Virtual assistant or general admin work



How to apply:



Send a short message introducing yourself. Include:

1. How many years you have been copyediting books or manuscripts

2. One or two examples of published books you have edited (titles only is fine)

3. Your expected hourly rate in EUR, USD or PHP

4. Your availability (hours per day, days per week)



If your application is strong, we will send you a paid test chapter (roughly 3,000 words with the style sheet). The test is paid at your hourly rate.



This is a long-term position with a steady pipeline of books. We pay on time, every time.

title: Social Media Editor
description:
We’re looking for a Social Media Editor who gets the internet. You’ll be creating and editing short-form videos and visuals designed to go viral — not just exist. If you’re chronically online, obsessed with trends, and know why content blows up, this role was made for you.



Why You’ll Love This Role:

*Fully remote — work from anywhere

*No micromanaging

*Paid training + ongoing feedback

*Creative, supportive, non-toxic team

*Real growth opportunities into senior creative or strategy roles

*You get paid to do what you already do for fun



What You’ll Be Doing:

You’ll be editing and creating content that’s meant to perform, not just look pretty.



*Editing viral-style short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

*Creating eye-catching visual content and photos for social media

*Turning ideas, trends, and raw footage into scroll-stopping posts

*Keeping up with trending audios, formats, 
s, and Gen Z humor

*Writing captions that sound real, not robotic

*Collaborating with a creative team that actually listens to your ideas

*Helping social media pages grow through smart, trend-driven content

*You’ll get training, clear direction, and the freedom to bring your own creative flavor.



What We’re Looking For:

We’re not hunting for “years of experience.” We’re looking for taste, instinct, and passion. That looks like:



*A genuine love for social media and content creation

*Strong understanding of trends, viral formats, and internet culture

*High-level English communication skills

*A good eye for visuals, pacing, and aesthetics

*Confidence, curiosity, and positive energy

*Willingness to learn, test ideas, and improve fast

* Having a personal brand or active social media account is a plus, not a requirement.



How to Apply?



Send us:

*A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) showing your personality, creativity, and why you’re a great fit. NO INTRO VIDEO AUTO FAIL

*Link to your creative portfolio

* Add the word 'Awesome' to your application so we know you've read everything

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
This Role Is For You If You’re:



- Chronically online (and proud of it)

- Always scrolling, saving, reposting, analyzing

- The friend who just knows why a post went viral

- Fluent in English and confident expressing ideas

- Creative, enthusiastic, and full of good energy

- Lowkey building (or dreaming of building) your own online brand



If social media feels less like “work” and more like second nature, then this is for you! 



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll help create, shape, and manage content that’s meant to perform, not just exist.



Your day-to-day includes:

- Creating short-form videos and trendy visual content

- Brainstorming ideas based on what’s viral, aesthetic, and engaging

- Writing captions that sound human (not corporate)

- Staying on top of trends, audios, formats, and Gen Z humor

- Helping grow social media pages through smart, creative content

- Collaborating with a creative team that actually values your ideas



You’ll be trained, supported, and encouraged to bring your own creative voice.





What We’re Looking For:



We’re not obsessed with years of experience. We care more about:



- Genuine love for social media + content creation

- Strong understanding of Gen Z trends and internet culture

- High-level English communication skills

This role is for someone who shows up with personality, creativity, and confidence.

We can’t wait to see what you bring!

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT
description:
We are seeking a high-level Executive Assistant to work directly with the founder of a growing multi-company business. This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone who can operate with professionalism, discretion, urgency, and strong business judgment.



You will serve as a trusted right hand to the executive, helping manage priorities, communications, scheduling, coordination, follow-up, and special projects across multiple business activities. The right person is highly organized, calm under pressure, detail-oriented, and able to keep moving parts under control without needing constant direction.



This role is best suited for someone who takes pride in excellence, communicates clearly, thinks ahead, and knows how to protect an executive’s time and attention.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing the executive’s calendar, schedule, and shifting priorities

Monitoring and organizing inboxes and ensuring important items are surfaced quickly

Following up on outstanding tasks, deadlines, and deliverables

Coordinating with internal tea
mbers, vendors, clients, and external contacts

Handling research, reporting, and administrative support with a high level of accuracy

Preparing summaries, documents, spreadsheets, and internal communications

Helping ensure execution across multiple projects and business functions

Maintaining organization across files, systems, and business records

Anticipating needs, solving problems, and reducing friction for the executive

Serving as a reliable gatekeeper and operator who helps keep the business leader focused on highest-value activities



What We’re Looking For

This is for someone who is more than just “helpful.” We are looking for someone who can function like a true executive partner in a remote environment.



You should be:



Exceptionally organized

Strong in written and verbal English

Professional and polished in communication

Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive information

Proactive, resourceful, and able to think ahead

Fast, responsive, and dependable

Comfortable working in a dynamic, fast-moving business environment

Able to manage multiple priorities without losing attention to detail

Capable of taking ownership and following through at a high level



Required Experience



Previous experience as an Executive Assistant supporting an owner, founder, CEO, or senior executive

Strong experience with calendar management, communications, follow-up, and executive support

Excellent command of English

Strong proficiency with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, documents, and online business tools

Proven ability to work independently and maintain high standards without micromanagement

Stable internet connection and professional remote work setup



Strongly Preferred



Experience supporting US-based executives or companies

Experience in operations, project coordination, or business support

Strong judgment in handling confidential information and executive communications

Ability to create order in fast-moving environments

Experience working across multiple business functions or entities



This Role Is Not For



Applicants looking for a casual VA position

People who need constant instruction to complete tasks

Candidates who are slow to respond, disorganized, or inconsistent

Those who struggle with follow-through, prioritization, or professionalism



Why This Role Is Different

This is an opportunity to become a key support person to a founder leading multiple business initiatives. The right candidate will be trusted, valued, and given meaningful responsibility. We are looking for a long-term person who wants to grow into a high-impact role, not someone looking for short-term freelance work.



To Apply

Please send the following:



Your resume

A short introduction explaining your Executive Assistant experience

The names or types of executives you have supported

The tools and software you are strongest with

Your expected monthly salary

A short paragraph on how you manage competing priorities and protect an executive’s time

Include the word FORESIGHT in your application subject line so we know you read the full post



Here’s an even sharper short-form premium version you could use if you want something tighter and more selective:



Executive Assistant to Founder / CEO

We are hiring a high-level Executive Assistant to support a founder leading multiple businesses. This is not a general VA role. We are looking for someone polished, highly organized, proactive, discreet, and capable of protecting executive time, driving follow-through, and helping manage priorities at a high level.



You must have experience supporting a business owner, founder, CEO, or senior executive. You should be excellent in English, highly responsive, strong with calendars and communications, and able to operate independently without constant supervision.



You will help manage scheduling, inboxes, follow-up, coordination, research, reporting, and special projects. You must be calm under pressure, detail-oriented, and capable of handling confidential matters professionally.



To apply, send your resume, a short introduction, your executive support experience, your expected salary, and include FORESIGHT in your subject line.

title: AI agent implementation specialist
description:
Job Title: AI Automation Specialist (Zapier/Make + API Integrations + Node.js)

About Us



We are a fast-growing group of businesses in distribution (food & beverage logistics) and car rentals (Turo + private fleet rentals), based in Hawaii. We are building AI-powered automation agents to streamline operations across multiple companies (order desk automation, guest messaging, cash flow forecasting, etc.).



We already have a starter kit and workflows mapped out, and we are looking for a tech-savvy implementer to set it up, connect APIs, and make everything run smoothly.



Responsibilities



Deploy and configure our AI Agents Starter Kit (Node.js + Express + Docker).



Connect APIs and webhooks for:



QuickBooks Online (invoices, AR/AP)



inFlow Inventory (stock + orders)



RentCentric (car rentals)



Turo (guest messaging, pricing)



Twilio (SMS/WhatsApp)



Google Sheets/Slack (dashboards & notifications)



Build automation flows in Zapier or Make (Integromat) where possible.



Create custom middleware/API calls where Zapier/Make doesn’t support.



Implement daily/weekly reports (cash flow, fleet utilization, delivery performance).



Ensure security best practices (API keys, webhooks, error handling).



Document workflows and provide clear SOPs for ongoing operations.



Qualifications



Strong experience with Zapier and/or Make (Integromat).



Solid Node.js/JavaScript skills (Express, REST APIs).



Familiarity with QuickBooks API, inventory systems (inFlow or similar), and car rental/booking platforms is a plus.



Experience deploying apps with Docker (basic setup).



Knowledge of Twilio SMS/WhatsApp integration.



Comfortable working with OpenAI API (ChatGPT) or other LLMs.



Strong attention to detail and documentation.



Reliable, communicative, and proactive problem-solver.



Work Setup



Remote work (Philippines-based).



20–40 hours per week (flexible, with possibility to go full-time).



Must be responsive during overlapping hours with Hawaii (HST).



Paid weekly via OnlineJobs.ph or direct method.



Compensation



$800–$1,200 USD/month (full-time) depending on experience and skillset.



Bonuses for successful milestones (e.g., working prototypes, production launch).



Long-term position possible as we continue to scale AI agents across all businesses.



How to Apply



Send your resume + portfolio (links to past Zapier/Make/Node.js automations).



Share 1–2 specific examples of API integrations you have built.



In your subject line, please write: “AI Automation Specialist – [Your Name]”.



Answer this quick question in your cover letter: “How would you connect QuickBooks Online and inFlow Inventory so an order placed by
 automatically becomes an invoice?”

title: Remote Copywriter for Short Form Content (Philippines Time Zone)
description:
We are looking for a dependable copywriter who is fluent in English, has a background in marketing, is familiar with social media content, and is seeking a remote role Monday through Saturday. You will be trained to rewrite high performing viral Instagram Reels into scripts tailored for our agency’s clients.



Availability



This role requires availability Monday through Saturday.



Ideally between 9:30 AM and 5:30 PM Philippines time, though later working hours can be arranged for candidates who prefer an evening schedule.



Requirements



- Fluent in English, mandatory requirement

- Experience in marketing or copywriting, mandatory requirement

- Very responsive and reliable on WhatsApp

- Able to learn quickly and follow systems

- Comfortable using tools such as Notion, Claude, ChatGPT, and Google Workspace

- Able to work independently using provided training and documentation



Compensation



- The position begins with a paid training period lasting approximately 2 to 4 weeks

- During training, you will be paid per short form script at a starting rate of 130 PHP per script

- As your speed and quality improve, pay may increase up to 290 PHP per script

- For trainees, a script may take up to 1 hour to complete

- Experienced copywriters typically complete a script in 15 to 30 minutes

- Over time, if we work well together, compensation may transition to a fixed monthly salary



The exact rate progression will be discussed once training is completed.



Marketing Knowledge Expectation



Applicants should be familiar with common marketing and social media concepts such as pain points, ideal client profile (ICP), target audience, hooks, calls to action (CTA), value proposition, engagement tactics, and conversion focused content.



How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following information:



1. Your WhatsApp number

2. Confirmation that you are available during the listed time windows

3. Your background in marketing and social media

4. The smartphone model you use

5. The laptop model you use

6. A Google Drive link containing a screenshot of your internet speed test results. Make sure the link is set to “Anyone with the link.”



Thank you for your interest. We will review applications and contact shortlisted candidates.

title: ASSISTANT OPERATIONS MANAGER – CLIENT EXPERIENCE (Female only, Full-Time, Remote – Philippines)
description:
Join a mission-driven company empowering women across Asia to live stronger, healthier, and more confident lives.



We're expanding our operations team — and we're looking for a sharp, polished, and proactive Assistant Operations Manager to be the professional frontline between our clients and our Singapore leadership team.



This is a long-term, full-time position with real career growth for the right person.



YOUR ROLE

You'll work directly with our Operations Manager and Singapore-based Director, supporting the full client journey — from onboarding through to programme completion — while ensuring backend operations run accurately and on time.



Your main responsibilities:

> Manage client onboarding, scheduling, confirmations, and reminders per SOP

> Handle professional client communications via phone, Zoom, and messaging platforms

> Coordinate with Singapore-based coaches and leadership on session logistics and events

> Maintain accurate records across CRM systems, trackers, and shared drives

> Support webinar logistics — registration follow-ups, nurture calls, and attendance confirmation

> Monitor group chats, respond to client queries, and escalate where needed

> Conduct call audits and document client interaction logs

> Uphold confidentiality and professional standards at all times



WHAT YOU'LL LOVE ABOUT WORKING WITH US

- 95% Remote — work from home without the commute

- KPI-based pay — your effort is directly rewarded

- Stable, long-term career role — not a project, not a gig

- Singapore travel opportunity — top performers join us onsite for company events

- Clear SOPs and structured onboarding — you'll never be left guessing

- Leadership that's direct, fair, and invested in your growth

- Training and continuous development — we build you up as we grow

- Integrity-first culture — no politics, no drama



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

> Excellent English — written and spoken, polished and professional

> Typing speed of at least 45 WPM

> A warm, confident phone and Zoom presence — clients will speak with you directly

> Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

> Experience in client-facing roles: corporate admin, BPO, hospitality, customer success, or similar

> Proficiency with Google Workspace, CRM tools, and Zoom

> Reliable internet with a backup plan

> A quiet, professional home workspace with webcam and good lighting

> A track record of follow-through, accuracy, and proactive communication



NOT A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

> Have other part-time or freelance commitments

> Are uncomfortable speaking directly with clients on calls

> Struggle with deadlines, SOPs, or working independently

> Need to be reminded to complete recurring tasks

> Respond to challenges with excuses instead of solutions

> Have frequent internet or power disruptions without a contingency plan



We need someone who takes ownership, communicates without being prompted, and holds themselves to a high standard.



WORK HOURS

Tuesday to Saturday | 1:00 PM – 10:00 PM (Singapore Time) Aligned with our Singapore operations and client base.



OUR COMPANY VALUES

Everything we do is built on five non-negotiables:

Honesty — tell the truth, always

Integrity — deliver with excellence and accuracy

Commitment — follow through, every time

Growth Mindset — keep learning, keep improving

Team Spirit — respect, collaboration, and positivity



HOW TO APPLY

Send an
 with the subject line: "AOM – Client Experience" and include clear, complete answers to ALL of the following:

1. Why should we hire you? Describe your experience — don't just list it.

2. Tell us about a time you handled a difficult client situation. What happened and what did you do?

3. Where in the Philippines are you based, and how stable is your power and internet?

4. What equipment do you use? Include computer specs and internet speed.

5. What is your backup plan if there's a power or internet outage?

6. Record a short audio introduction — share your name, something you're proud of professionally, and your favourite place to visit.

7. Attach a screenshot of your DISC profile from OnlineJobs.ph.

8. Take a typing test at 
 and include your screenshot result.



If you're looking for a stable, growth-oriented role where your work genuinely matters — and where you'll be trusted, challenged, and developed — we'd love to hear from you.



Apply now and build your career with a team that values excellence, integrity, and real results.

title: Hiring: Video Editors (Long-Form & Short-Form | Remote)
description:
We are a small but growing team looking for reliable video editors who want to grow with us long-term.



This role is best suited for individuals who not only know how to edit but also understand content, including what makes a video engaging, what makes a “hook” work, and how to structure videos that keep attention.





Availability



You can work flexible hours as long as you submit videos on time, but we may require you to be responsive Monday to Saturday from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM Philippine time for feedback and communication.





References



Long-form: 



- 

- 



Short-form: 



- 

- 

- 

- 





About the Work



You will be working on both long-form and short-form content, including podcasts and social media clips.



Your responsibilities will include:



- Cutting and structuring long-form content into clean, watchable videos

- Selecting strong short-form clips (not random cuts)

- Ensuring the first 30 seconds (hook) are clear, engaging, and make sense

- Adding clean, accurate captions with proper grammar and phrasing





Requirements



- Strong English comprehension (*MOST IMPORTANT*)

    - Must understand context, conversations, and messaging

    - Must recognize what makes a hook or clip effective



- Strong attention to detail

    - Catch grammar mistakes, caption errors, and awkward phrasing

    - Ensure quality, especially in the first 30 seconds



- Good clip selection skills

    - Ability to identify meaningful and engaging 
nts

    - Not just cutting randomly



- Clean captioning skills

    - Proper grammar and capitalization

    - Natural, easy-to-read phrasing



- Basic editing skills

    - Clean cuts

    - Simple subtitles

    - Clear structure



- Reliable, responsive, and easy to communicate with (WhatsApp/Slack during work hours)



- Able to follow systems, apply feedback, and improve quickly





Tools



You may use tools such as Premiere Pro, Final Cut, Da Vinci, CapCut or similar.



Specific tools are less important than output quality.





Compensation



Compensation will be discussed once candidates are shortlisted or qualified for the role.





How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following:



1. Your WhatsApp number

2. Confirmation that you are available during the listed time window

3. What type of video editing software you use

4. Your portfolio (short-form + long-form samples, if available)

title: Part-Time Creative Designer – Social Media, Email & Branding (Remote)
description:
Schedule: Monday–Friday, Available anytime from 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM (PHT) (Ideally working 4h per day, but that depends on workload)

Work Arrangement: Remote



About Boardgame Studio

Boardgame Studio [
] is a brand creative and incubation studio that partners with founders, creators, and companies to build, launch, and grow standout brands. Our services span brand identity, package design, creative direction, web design and development, brand strategy, and copywriting. We're also the team behind in-house brands like Jiggies, Notorious Foodie, and FluffCo — built from the ground up right here in our studio.



About the Role

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented Part-Time Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will create visually compelling designs across a range of formats — from social media graphics and
 layouts to product packaging and photo manipulation. 



You'll work directly with a Project Manager who will guide you through tasks, provide briefs, and ensure alignment on priorities. Daily check-ins are part of the workflow to keep projects on track, share updates, and make sure you have everything you need to do your best work. This is a fast-paced environment where quick turnarounds and clear communication are key.



Responsibilities

- Design and produce social media graphics,
 layouts, and other marketing materials

- Perform photo manipulation and retouching to meet project specifications

- Collaborate with tea
mbers using Figma for design development, feedback, and handoff

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual outputs

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously, often delivering final assets within a one-day turnaround (longer turn-around times are allotted for larger projects)

- Organize and maintain design files with proper naming conventions for easy team access and version control

- Communicate proactively with the team — asking clarifying questions to ensure accuracy and alignment before executing



What We're Looking For/Requirements



Required Skills & Experience

- Proven experience in graphic design, with a strong portfolio showcasing work in photo manipulation,
 layouts, and social media graphics

- Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop (must have access to authentic/licensed Adobe products)

- Extensive hands-on experience working in Figma

- A keen eye for design — strong sense of layout, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy

- Open to working with AI-powered tools (e.g., Higgsfield.ai, Claude) as part of the creative workflow — you don't need to be an expert, but a willingness to learn and adapt is essential

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and consistently meet tight deadlines (one-day turnaround)



Nice to Have

- Packaging design experience

- Video editing skills (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar tools)



Soft Skills

- Excellent communication skills — clear, responsive, and not afraid to ask questions

- Strong time management and ability to prioritize competing tasks

- Self-motivated and dependable, with a proactive approach to problem-solving



Technical Requirements

Since this is a remote position, candidates must have the following:

- A computer with a strong processor and dedicated GPU capable of handling graphic design workloads

- Reliable, stable internet connection

- Licensed copies of Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop



How to Apply

Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief note about your relevant experience. We'd love to see examples of work in social media design,
 layouts, and photo manipulation.

title: Amazon Listing & Category Management Specialist
description:
Role Brief:

We are looking for a dedicated, high-level Amazon Listing & Category Management Specialist to take full ownership of a specific product category within our storefront. This is not a "task-taker" role; we need someone who understands the nuances of Seller Central and can manage a category from top to bottom independently.

Listing Excellence: End-to-end listing creation, optimization (copy and backend), and managing complex variations.



SEO & Growth: Conduct deep-dive keyword research and competitor analysis to improve organic visibility and conversion rates.



Operations: Manage catalog health, troubleshoot listing suppressions, and coordinate FBA shipments and inventory levels.



Market Intelligence: Monitor the competitive landscape and proactively suggest improvements to keep our category leading the market.



Required Experience & Skills:



Strict Requirement: At least 2 years of continuous, uninterrupted experience specifically in Amazon Seller Central management.



Expertise in Amazon SEO, Helium 10/Jungle Scout, and Flat Files.



Strong understanding of FBA workflows and inventory planning.

Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.

title: Documentary Scriptwriter (1.5M+ YouTube Subscribers)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a long-term Scriptwriter & Researcher for our Documentary-Style YouTube Channel "Visual Venture" | 1.5M+ Subscribers (



Qualifications 



- Must have expert story-telling skills (3+ years)

- Has strong interest in investigative research

- Must be able to write in our style (Refer to our channel)



Ideal Candidate



Our mission is to make the world a better place.  If you write scripts only for money, don't apply. We only want someone who is very passionate about writing and is always looking for ways to improve.

title: Scriptwriter for Documentaries (1.5M+ Subs on YouTube)
description:
Hi there!



We are looking for a long-term Scriptwriter & Researcher for our Documentary-Style YouTube Channel "Visual Venture" | 1.5M+ Subscribers (



- Must have expert story-telling skills (3+ years)

- Must have strong knowledge of story-telling structure (3+ years)

- Must be able to thrive under tight deadlines

- Has strong interest in investigative research

- Must be able to write in our style (Refer to our channel)



Our mission is to make the world a better place.  If you write scripts only for money, don't apply. We only want someone who is very passionate about writing and is always looking for ways to improve.



*NOTE*: To be considered, you must apply here:

title: Appointment Setter / Lead Generation Specialist (Web, AI & Automation Services)
description:
We are looking for a results-driven appointment setter to help us consistently book qualified meetings with business owners interested in web design, AI, and automation services.



This is a performance-focused role. If you can generate conversations and get decision-makers on calls, you will do very well here.



You will be responsible for identifying potential leads, initiating outreach, and setting appointments directly on our calendar.



?



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Identify and source potential leads (business owners, founders, decision-makers)

 • Conduct outreach via
, social media (Instagram, LinkedIn), and other channels

 • Start conversations and qualify prospects

 • Book meetings directly into our calendar

 • Maintain basic tracking of outreach and conversations



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong communication skills (clear, confident, persuasive)

 • Ability to start conversations and get responses

 • Self-starter — no micromanagement

 • Comfortable with cold outreach (this is NOT a passive role)

 • Experience in lead generation, appointment setting, or sales is a plus





Ideal Candidate

 • Hungry, competitive, and outcome-driven

 • Understands that volume + consistency = results

 • Not afraid of rejection

 • Focused on getting meetings booked — not just sending messages



?



Important



This role is about results, not activity.

If you can consistently book meetings, you will have long-term opportunities with us.



?



How to Apply



Send a brief message explaining:

 1. Your experience with outreach or appointment setting

 2. What platforms/tools you’ve used

 3. How you would approach booking meetings for web/AI services

        4. Results from your experience and past work

title: Social Media & Community Manager
description:
Are you a social media enthusiast with a knack for building online communities?



TREND Agency is a fast-growing creative studio based in Melbourne, Australia. We create bold, scroll-stopping content for brands across food, lifestyle and beyond. We’re currently on the lookout for a Philippines-based Social Media & Community Manager to join us in a part-time or casual capacity.



What You’ll Be Doing

Creating and scheduling content for various clients

Producing a monthly content calendars for internal review

Daily community management: responding to DMs, comments, and engaging with followers

Maintaining consistency across brands tone and messaging

Monitoring performance and sharing feedback with the team

Working closely with our internal social media team



You’ll Need

Experience using Meta Business Suite (Instagram &
)

Bonus if you’ve used Later for social media scheduling

Excellent written English and communication skills

A proactive attitude and strong attention to detail

Capable of adapting to different tones of voices and brands



The Details

Casual/part-time trial role (hours to be confirmed based on experience and availability)

Fully remote – work from anywhere in the Philippines

Some availability required during Australian business hours

Opportunity to expand to a full-time role if successful



Who You’ll Be Working With

You’ll join a passionate, collaborative team of creatives and strategists at TREND Agency. We value initiative, creativity, and a genuine love for the fast-moving world of social.



Interested?

Send your CV and portfolio to 

We’d love to hear from you.

title: SEO Outreach & Backlink Specialist (with Content Structuring Skills)
description:
We are looking for a results-driven SEO Outreach & Backlink Specialist to join our team and help improve our website authority, rankings, and organic traffic.



This role is ideal for someone who understands modern SEO (2025 standards), including high-quality link building, outreach strategies, and content optimization.



Key Responsibilities

Build high-quality backlinks through ethical (white-hat) strategies

Identify and execute outreach opportunities (guest posts, partnerships, niche edits, PR links, etc.)

Research and secure links from relevant, high-authority domains

Develop and manage
 outreach campaigns

Structure and optimize website content for SEO performance

Improve internal linking and on-page SEO structure

Analyze backlink profiles and suggest improvements

Work on strategies to improve Domain Authority (DA) / Domain Rating (DR)

Monitor competitor backlink strategies and replicate winning tactics

Requirements

Proven experience in SEO link building & outreach

Strong understanding of tools like:

Ahrefs / SEMrush / Moz

Google Search Console

Screaming Frog (bonus)

Experience with anchor text strategy & link diversification

Ability to identify toxic vs high-quality backlinks

Good understanding of content structuring for SEO (H1-H6, schema, internal linking)

Strong communication skills for outreach campaigns

Experience in UK or international SEO is a plus

Nice to Have

Experience with Digital PR campaigns

Knowledge of schema markup (FAQ, Article, Organization, etc.)

Understanding of AI SEO / GEO SEO strategies

Experience working with WordPress

What We’re Looking For

Someone who focuses on quality over quantity

Can bring new ideas to improve domain authority

Data-driven mindset with clear reporting

Long-term collaboration mindset

How to Apply



Please share:



Examples of backlinks you’ve built

Outreach campaigns you’ve managed

Tools and strategies you typically use

Any case studies showing improvement in DA/traffic

title: Amazon PPC/Ads Manager (Remote)
description:
We are a dynamic and growing e-commerce agency specializing in online retail. We manage multiple brands on Amazon and are looking for a dedicated Amazon Ads (PPC) Manager to join our team. This is a full time role. 



Responsibilities:



Develop, implement, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display).

Conduct keyword research and competitive analysis to enhance campaign performance.

Monitor and analyze ad performance metrics, adjusting bids and strategies accordingly.

Collaborate with the design and product teams to align ad strategies with overall business goals.

Stay updated on Amazon’s advertising platform updates and industry trends.

Generate detailed reports on campaign performance and provide strategic recommendations.





Requirements:



3+ years of experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns.

Proven ability to optimize campaigns for ACOS, ROAS, and overall profitability.

Experience with bulk file management and automation tools is a plus.

Data-driven mindset with excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and reporting abilities.





Benefits:



Fully Remote Role

A dynamic and supportive work environment.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

The chance to work with a passionate and driven team.

title: Operations & Logistics Virtual Assistant (Day-Shift)
description:
We are seeking 2 high-caliber Processing & Coordination Virtual Assistants to support a leading Australian mechanical services provider. The company specializes in comprehensive commercial and industrial refrigeration, heating, and air conditioning (HVAC/R) solutions, serving a diverse range of sectors including mining, healthcare, infrastructure, and retail across New South Wales and Queensland.



In this role, you will serve as an essential counterpart to the Australian-based team, managing the technical and administrative "engine room" of the business to ensure seamless operational growth.



Role Overview



As an Operations & Logistics VA, you will be responsible for high-volume back-end administration, data management, and supplier coordination. You will work within a secure virtual desktop environment (Azure/Windows 365) to maintain data sovereignty while ensuring all service and project workflows are executed with meticulous accuracy.



Tasks and Responsibilities



- Simpro Data Management: Manage the primary back-end of Simpro, including daily data entry, job processing, and operational reporting.

- Financial Processing & Xero: Execute data entry for packing slips and supplier invoices; perform consistent bank reconciliations and assist with Accounts Receivable/debt collection.

- Supplier Coordination: Act as a professional point of contact for approximately 12 main suppliers to request quotes, check part availability, and follow up on orders.

- Podium System Oversight: Monitor automation triggers (such as review requests) and manage soft-phone/text-based interactions within the Podium platform.

- SOP & Handbook Development: Assist in creating the company "blueprint" by maintaining a comprehensive Employee Handbook and documenting processes with training links.

- CRM & Task Management: Utilize Zoho for remote task tracking and Microsoft 365 (Teams/Outlook) for internal communication.

- Daily Coordination: Participate in mandatory daily cadence sessions with the Australian team to ensure business assimilation and alignment.



Qualifications: 



- Industry Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience in administrative or VA roles, specifically within trade, construction, or high-volume service industries.

- Software Proficiency: High proficiency in Xero (specifically bank reconciliations) and Microsoft 365. Prior experience with Simpro is highly preferred (or similar systems like ServiceM8, Tradify or Aroflo).

- Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written English with a neutral accent suitable for professional daily interactions with Australian stakeholders.

- Technical Aptitude: Proven ability to work efficiently within a secured virtual desktop environment (Azure) and manage digital security tools like NordPass.

- Mindset & Work Ethic: An energetic, proactive "self-starter" who can learn complex systems via training modules rather than requiring constant supervision.

- Attention to Detail: Meticulous accuracy in managing data entry across integrated platforms (Simpro, Xero, Zoho) to ensure error-free reporting.



The Perks

- Comprehensive Leave & Allowances: Includes 10 days Annual Leave, 5 days Personal Leave, 10 Public Holidays, and a Birthday Gift Allowance.

- Remote & Stable Work: 100% remote work setup with a consistent dayshift arrangement in a long-term, stable position.

- Growth & Support: Access to comprehensive training materials, documented processes, and a friendly, no-drama team environment.

- Health & Benefits: Philhealth contributions (P1200 per 6 months) and the opportunity to work with high-profile, prestigious brands.



Application Process



Ready to Join Us?



If you're interested in becoming part of our amazing team, Apply Here:

title: Senior Business Development Manager / Sales Closer
description:
About Us:



Talking HealthTech connects the digital health ecosystem through media, content, community, and partnerships.



THT Productions is our media production arm, helping healthcare and health tech organisations create high-quality podcasts, video content, branded content, and campaign assets.



We work with companies in healthcare and health technology that want to build visibility, credibility, and stronger market presence.



We are looking for a senior, client-facing sales professional to help us grow both sides of the business.



About the Role:



This is not an admin role.

This is not a support role.

This is not a junior appointment setter role.



This is a senior sales and business development role for someone who is confident speaking with decision-makers, comfortable running sales conversations, and able to represent the company professionally in writing, on calls, and in meetings.



You will help drive revenue across:



* Talking HealthTech partnerships and sponsorships

* THT Productions podcast, video, and branded content projects

* expansion opportunities with existing clients and partners



Some opportunities will be warm. Some will need follow-up. Some will need you to create 
ntum through research, outreach, LinkedIn, and consistent follow-up.



We want someone who is commercially mature, highly autonomous, and comfortable owning a pipeline.



What You’ll Be Doing:

* Follow up inbound leads, referrals, event contacts, and existing opportunities

* Prospect and generate new opportunities when needed through LinkedIn, research, outreach, and follow-up

* Run sales calls and video meetings with senior stakeholders

* Write clear, professional
s and messages that move deals forward

* Present our offers confidently and handle objections well

* Close partnership, sponsorship, and production opportunities

* Keep CRM records, notes, and next steps up to date in Pipedrive

* Work closely with the Founder to refine messaging, offers, and sales approach

* Represent the company professionally in all client-facing communication



What We’re Looking For:



You should have strong experience in one or more of the following:



* B2B sales

* business development

* agency sales

* media sales

* sponsorship sales

* SaaS or consultative services sales



You must also have:



* excellent spoken English

* excellent written English

* confidence on the phone and on video calls

* available to work during Australian business hours (9am - 5pm AEDT - Sydney)

* experience speaking with managers, directors, founders, or executives

* the ability to work independently without constant supervision

* strong follow-up habits

* confidence using LinkedIn as part of your sales workflow

* experience managing a pipeline inside a CRM (Pipedrive)



This Role Is a Strong Fit If You:

* are a strong communicator, verbally and in writing

* are comfortable getting on calls and leading conversations

* know how to move a deal forward without sounding pushy or sloppy

* can build trust with senior people quickly

* are proactive and commercially minded

* can manage your own time and priorities

* want a long-term role where you can grow with the business

* are interested in healthcare, health tech, media, or B2B partnerships



This Role Is Not for You If:

* you are only comfortable doing chat or
 support

* you avoid phone calls or live meetings

* you need step-by-step supervision all day

* you are looking for a casual side job

* you are not confident communicating with senior stakeholders



Why Join Us:



This is a chance to work closely with an established founder-led business in a niche that actually matters.



You’ll be selling across a respected health tech media brand and a growing production business, with room to build relationships, deepen your market knowledge, and become a meaningful part of our growth.



We are looking for someone who wants this to be their main professional focus, not a filler job between other gigs.



Working Arrangement:

* Full-time remote

* Long-term role

* Monthly salary



Flexible remote setup, but you must have reliable internet, good audio, and a professional environment for video calls and meetings



To Apply:



Please do not send a generic copy-paste application.



To be considered, send:

* A short introduction about your B2B sales experience

* A brief voice note or Loom video in English

* One example of a deal you helped close and what you personally did to move it forward

* The CRM tools you’ve used

* Your expected hourly rate

* Start your application with the words: HealthTech Growth (That helps us know you read the full post... we can also tell if you've just generated it through Chat GPT too... )

title: META ADS SPECIALIST (E-COM / ACTIVEWEAR)
description:
Meta Ads Specialist 
 & Instagram) — Performance-Driven E-commerce Brand (Part-Time, Long-Term)

Timezone: Flexible (must overlap a few hours weekly)



Who we are



Funktion Active is a premium women’s activewear brand where performance meets style built for women who train hard and want to look powerful doing it.



We are not a “basic dropshipping brand.”

We are building a performance-fashion brand with a strong identity, fast execution, and high standards.



What we need



I’m looking for a high-level Meta Ads specialist to work alongside me strategically not just someone who runs ads blindly.



This is a thinking role, not a button-clicking role.



You will help:



Build and execute Meta ad strategy 
 + Instagram)

Test creatives (UGC, hooks, angles, offers)

Optimize campaigns based on real performance data

Identify winners fast and scale them

Work closely with me on direction, testing, and decisions

What success looks like

You understand e-commerce + creative testing deeply

You know how to find winning creatives, not just manage ads

You can explain WHY something is working or not

You move fast, test fast, and adjust fast

You care about ROAS, CPA, and real business results

Responsibilities

Campaign setup, testing, and scaling (Meta Ads)

Creative testing strategy (angles, hooks, formats)

Audience testing (broad, interests, retargeting)

Daily/weekly performance analysis

Suggest new ideas to improve performance (ads + funnel)

Work directly with founder (fast feedback loop)

Non-negotiables (READ CAREFULLY)

Proven experience running Meta Ads for e-commerce brands

You have managed $1k–$10k+/month ad spend minimum

You understand UGC-style ads and creative testing frameworks

You are data-driven (not guessing)

You are proactive — you don’t wait to be told everything

Bonus (but valuable)

Experience in fashion / activewear / apparel

Experience working with creators / UGC pipelines

Understanding of funnels (landing pages, CRO, offers)

Experience scaling brands past $10k–$50k/month revenue

This is NOT for you if:

You just “set and forget” campaigns

You rely only on interests and old strategies

You can’t explain your thinking clearly

You need step-by-step instructions for everything

How to apply (IMPORTANT — we filter hard)



Send:



Case studies or results

ROAS, CPA, spend, what you actually did

Ad account experience

What kind of brands you worked with

Your strategy (short answer):

“If you launch a new activewear brand with no data, how would you test creatives in the first 14 days?”

Your hourly rate

Final note



We are building something big, fast.



I don’t want average.

I want someone sharp, fast, and accountable.



If that’s you apply. don't just message me here
 me at

title: Senior Accountant – Xero Expert
description:
[IMPORTANT: Failure to follow the application instructions will result in automatic disqualification.]



We are looking for a Senior Accountant who is still highly hands-on with bookkeeping tasks to join our growing international team.

- Is comfortable doing day-to-day bookkeeping work

- Can own the numbers while still doing the work themselves



What This Role Is

This role is ideal for someone who:

> process transactions

You will be responsible for both execution AND insight.



What You’ll Do

Prepare:

- Monthly Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cash Flow reports

- Identify trends and provide insights to management



Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage invoices, payments, and collections

- Track outstanding balances



Payroll Support

- Assist with payroll processing and accuracy



Tax & Compliance Support

- Assist with BAS and GST reporting

- Maintain compliance with Australian standards



Budgeting & Forecasting

- Support budgeting and financial planning

- Assist with cost tracking and projections



Xero Ownership

- Manage and maintain Xero daily

- Improve and optimize accounting processes



What We’re Looking For

- Senior Accountant (Hands-On)

- 3+ years experience in accounting/bookkeeping

- Must be comfortable doing both senior-level thinking AND daily bookkeeping tasks



Xero Expertise (Required)

- Strong working knowledge of Xero

Able to perform:

- reconciliation

- reporting

- account setup

- troubleshooting



Australian Accounting Knowledge (Preferred)

Experience with:

- BAS

- GST

- Australian compliance



Strong Accounting Fundamentals

Understanding of:

- accruals

- journal entries

- financial statements



Detail-Oriented & Organized

- High accuracy in financial records

- Strong time management skills



Communication Skills

- Clear English communication

- Ability to explain financial data simply



Bonus Points

- Experience with Australian clients

- CPA or accounting degree and certification

- Experience with growing businesses or startups

- Experience improving accounting systems or workflows



Why Join Us

- Fully remote role

- Work with an international team

- Stable, long-term opportunity

- Opportunity to grow into a Finance Lead role

- Make a real impact on business decisions



How to Apply

To be considered, you MUST submit:

1. CV

2. Portfolio (Google Drive Folder)

Include:

- Resume

- Sample financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Reconciliation samples

- Any dashboards or reports

Make sure access is set to “Anyone with the link”

3. Short Video (1–2 minutes)

Please answer:

- Your accounting experience

- Your experience with Xero

- Your experience with Australian clients

- Are you comfortable doing hands-on bookkeeping daily? (Important)



[Applications without ALL requirements will not be reviewed.]

mbers
