title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

description:

Not someone who “posts content.”

About Us



We are Developer Launch — one of the fastest-growing real estate development companies in Canada.



We help investors become real estate developers from scratch (even with zero experience).



Through our licensing model, our clients get:



Access to off-market land

Our construction + trades network

Financing partners (CMHC MLI Select)

Full done-for-you development system



???? Translation: We help people go from stuck investors to building multi-million dollar properties and making $500k+ profit in ONE deal.



Our mission:

Become the #1 real estate development brand in Canada.



???? Who We’re Looking For



We need a growth strategist + content creator hybrid who understands:



Instagram Reels

TikTok

YouTube Shorts



…and knows how each platform works differently.



You must know:



How to hook within 1–2 seconds

How to retain attention (watch time is everything)

How to structure viral storytelling

How to turn boring clips into addictive content

???? Your Role



You are responsible for growth. Not just posting.



Daily Output:

Minimum 6 posts/day across platforms (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Each post must be optimized per platform (NOT copy-paste)

Content Creation:

Pull content from Google Photos / raw footage

Cut + remix into story-driven short-form videos

Combine:

B-roll

Talking head clips

Text overlays

Hooks + pattern interrupts

Strategy:

Build and manage a content calendar + posting cadence

Study competitors and model viral content

Continuously test hooks, formats, and angles



???? What You MUST Be Good At



Viral hooks (this is EVERYTHING)

Storytelling (make people watch till the end)

Short-form editing (fast, engaging, modern style)

Understanding algorithms (IG / TikTok / YouTube)

Repurposing content across platforms correctly

Trend adaptation + remixing winning formats



???? KPIs (Non-Negotiable)

Minimum 6 high-quality posts per day



Increase:

Views

Watch time

Engagement

Followers

Ability to consistently create viral or high-performing content



?? This Is NOT For You If:

You only know basic editing

You wait for instructions instead of thinking

You don’t study viral content daily

You don’t understand retention, hooks, or pacing

???? Opportunity



Work directly with a fast-growing company

Be part of building a category-defining brand in real estate

Long-term opportunity with performance-based upside



???? How To Apply



Send:



Your BEST viral content examples (links only)

A breakdown of:

Why it went viral

What you would improve

Your favorite creators you study daily



A short note:

???? “If I had to grow your brand to 1M followers, here’s what I’d do…”

???? Final Note



We don’t care about resumes.



We care about:

???? Can you make content people can’t stop watching?



If yes — apply.

title: Senior Fiction Production Editor (Spicy Romance)
description:
I am seeking a meticulous, high-level Production Editor to take full ownership of my spicy romance novellas. I write fast-paced, high-tension stories (3-hour reads) set in an interconnected universe. I need a partner who does not just "give feedback" but takes a raw draft and delivers a publishing-ready manuscript. You will be the final gatekeeper for plot, character continuity, and "primal heat" pacing.



What You Will Own:



The Master Edit: Perform developmental, line, and copy editing on all drafts. You are responsible for catching "ghost blocking" (e.g., a character entering a room twice), inconsistent eye colors, and timeline errors.



Reader Integration: You will manage the feedback loop from my Alpha and Beta readers. You won't just pass their notes to me; you will analyze their feedback, d
 what strengthens the story, and implement the changes directly into the manuscript.



The Series Bible: Maintain a living document of character descriptions (scents, tattoos, eye colors) and locations to ensure 100?curacy across a 10+ book series.



AI-Enhanced Production: I will train you on my specific AI-assisted workflow to 10x your speed. You must be tech-curious and eager to master these tools to eliminate "AI-isms" and polish prose into punchy, humanized fiction.



Requirements:



Professional Credentials: You must have a portfolio of published fiction you have edited (Indie or Traditional).



Genre Expertise: Deep familiarity with spicy romance tropes. You must be comfortable editing explicit content.



Meticulous Eye: You are the person who notices if a character is "barefoot" in one paragraph and "clicking heels" in the next.



This role is for professionals only; I am not looking for students or those balancing other major commitments. Your professional availability must be entirely dedicated to this job.



Start your application with the name of your favorite Style Guide. Applications that do not start with this will be ignored.

description:

title: Software QA Tester (The Studio Breaker)
description:
Title: Software QA Tester (The Studio Breaker)



Company: Augmento – AR Studio (Dubai)

Role: Technical QA & Stress Test Specialist

Work Type: Gig / Project-based (8 hours/day)

Rate: $5/hr



The Mission:

We need a Software QA professional who enjoys breaking things. Your goal is to take our Augmento Studio platform and push it to its absolute limits to ensure it is bulletproof before global clients touch it. We are not looking for casual users; we need a "breaker."



What you will do:

1. Stress Testing: Try to break the Studio by adding excessive experiences, complex quizzes, and collectibles to find the system's failure points.

2. Feature Destruction: Thoroughly test Reward systems, UI/UX flows, and technical stability.

3. Cross-Device Validation: Validate performance across various Android and iOS devices in real-world conditions (lighting, connectivity, etc.).

4. Professional Reporting: Document every issue with screen recordings, reproducible steps, and device logs.



What we are looking for:

1. Proven Track Record: Real-world experience is valued over diplomas. A degree in CS/IT is a plus, but results matter most.

2. SaaS & Web Experience: Past experience testing cloud-based CMS platforms and mobile web applications (UAT/Functional).

3. Performance Testing: Experience simulating heavy user activity or large data uploads.

4. Mobile Browser Expertise: Understanding of Safari and Chrome limitations for media-heavy AR.



How to Apply:

1. Briefly summarize your technical QA experience and provide proof of past work (portfolio or sample bug reports).

2. Provide a quick outline of the structure or plan you would use to stress-test a WebAR platform. 



Note: If your application lacks a clear, sophisticated testing structure, it will be ignored.

title: Virtual Customer Experience Officer (Receptionist, Admin + Project Work)
description:
Virtual Receptionist / Administrator

Full-time (20-30hrs/week) | $5-8 AUD/hour | Sydney AEST Hours | Long-Term Role



We are hiring a confident, caring, and detail-oriented Virtual Customer Experience Officer to support two thriving Australian Businesses:



Carte Blanche Hair – a luxury salon delivering exquisite, high-touch experiences for self-expressed clients

Fixio Physiotherapy – a progressive clinic offering intelligent, empathetic care with clinical excellence



We are seeking a Virtual Receptionist / Administrator to become a long-term part of our operations team. This is a key role where you are the front line; the voice, the organiser, and the calm hand that ensures our client journey is flawless. You will support our in-salon and in-clinic teams by keeping bookings smooth, clients, informed, and back-end tasks running efficiently.

It is best suited to someone who values structure, consistency, and professional growth in a stable remote role. It also requires uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours so we prefer applicants with minimal personal obligations during work time.



About the Role



This position combines front-line receptionist duties, administrative support, and light project management. You will be a key point of contact for our clients and an essential support for our internal team. You will be working closely with the business owners and 1–2 other admin tea
mbers in a professional, fast-paced environment.



3 Key Components of the Role



1. Receptionist Duties

You will be responsible for managing two phone lines throughout your shift.

Answering and making calls using DialPad

Booking and managing appointments via Fresha (Salon) and Cliniko (Clinic)

Responding to phone, SMS, and
 enquiries with clarity, warmth, and confidence

Guiding clients toward the correct services and practitioners

Maintaining a calm, professional tone at all times



2. Administration

Inbox and
 management

Calendar coordination and scheduling

Data entry and record management

Strong daily use of Google Workspace

Team communication via Slack, WhatsApp, and Outlook

Handling sensitive client and HR information with discretion and confidentiality

Reporting directly to the business owners



3. Project Management (Ad Hoc)

Supporting operational projects as needed

Creating or improving internal resources

Identifying efficiencies in workflows and systems

Assisting with the creation of policies and procedures

Taking initiative and thinking critically without constant supervision



We are looking for someone who is:



A confident and kind communicator with a clear phone manner

Experienced in reception, admin, or client-facing roles (bonus if in hair/healthcare)

Fluent in English with strong conversational, writing, and spelling skills

Highly competent with Google workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, etc.)

Comfortable learning and navigating systems like Fresha, Cliniko, Cliniqflows, and DialPad

Emotionally Intelligent, organised, and able to multitask

A proactive team player who values both excellence and warmth



Work Requirements



Must be available during Sydney (AEST) Timezone. You will need to be available for ALL of the hours below:

Monday to Friday at 8:00am – 6:00pm AEST

Saturday at 8:00am – 3:00pm AEST

Starting at 20 hours per week (with potential to grow to 30+ hours per week)

Flexibility to cover other shifts when required

Stable internet connection (backup preferred)

Reliable power supply

Professional, quiet work setup

Ability to remain online and responsive throughout the shift



What We Offer



Stable, long-term remote role

Clear expectations and structured workflows

Supportive team environment

Work with premium, established Australian brands

Potential for career growth into a leadership/practice manager role encompassing invoicing, billing, additional project work, and training of other tea
mbers.

Contract & Compensation

Rate: $5-8 AUD/hour (This will depend on experience and proficiency in required skills)

Initial 3-month Trial Contract

Role begins within 1 week with training to start

Long-term role with increasing hours and potential to grow full-time



**Please note that no other work is permitted during rostered hours due to workload. This role requires consistent daily presence and uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours. Please apply only if this aligns with your current lifestyle and work environment.**



How to Apply



All applications must be submitted exclusively via our Google Form. We do not accept applications or CVs through OnlineJobs.ph messages.

To apply:

Carefully read the role description to ensure it aligns with your availability, work environment, and long-term goals

Complete the Google Form in full, providing clear and thoughtful responses

Access the Link Here:



Only applications submitted through the Google Form will be reviewed. Incomplete or rushed responses will not be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage, which may include a trial task.

title: Fashion Designer with Skills in Developing Tech Packs
description:
Fashion Designer (Tech Packs + Graphics) – Remote (PH-Based VA)

We’re looking for someone who actually understands how garments are made… not just how they look on a screen.

This role is for a fashion designer with strong graphic and technical skills who can take an idea and turn it into something production-ready.

You’ll be working closely with our lead designer to develop designs, build tech packs, and help bring projects from concept ? finished product.

About Us – Ecclesiastical Sewing

We are a U.S.-based company focused on creating high-quality church vestments from fine European liturgical textiles.

Everything we do is rooted in one idea:

  Worship Beautifully

We design and produce:

Chasubles, stoles, dalmatics, copes

Altar frontals, pulpit falls, chalice veils, burses, and banners

Digital Embroidery designs, appliqués, and custom sacred artwork

We use Premium fabrics, trims, and full DIY sewing systems

Our work blends traditional design, historical accuracy, and real craftsmanship.

 We are not a fast-fashion brand. We are not mass production.

We build pieces that are meant to last, to be used in worship, and to carry meaning.

That means the design work needs to be precise, intentional, and buildable.





What you’ll be doing:

Creating flat sketches and technical illustrations (Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, Canva, etc.)

Building clear, usable tech packs (measurements, materials, trims, construction notes)

Calculating yardage and supply needs for projects

Assisting with design adjustments and scaling proportions accurately

Helping refine designs so they actually work in production

Communicating with our team (and if skills allow, with clients to develop their custom projects) to move projects forward



What we’re looking for:

Strong experience with Adobe Suite (especially Illustrator)

Ability to create clean, professional tech packs (this is a big one)

Understanding of fabrics, trims, and garment construction

Experience with pattern making or working from patterns

Good eye for proportion, layout, and detail

Solid written English and ability to communicate clearly



Big plus if you have:

Hands-on sewing or garment construction experience

Pattern drafting or pattern illustration skills

Experience writing technical instructions / documentation

Willingness to learn digital embroidery software



Who this is for:

This is not a “make it look pretty” design role.

We’re looking for someone who can think through:

How is this actually made?

What does production need?

What could go wrong here?

If you’ve ever worked on real garments, samples, or production… you’ll do well here.



Details:

Remote (Philippines-based)

Part-time or full-time depending on fit

Long-term role with room to grow



To apply:

Send:

Portfolio (technical work preferred — flats, tech packs, etc.)

Short intro about your experience with garments and production

Include  examples of tech packs, illustrations, or construction docs you’ve created

Any sewing experience you may have.
salary: $4.50 to $8.00 per hour based on skills

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Company:



INNELS is a Full-service Amazon Agency where we help European and US brands to sell on Amazon and launch on global markets. We are a fully remote agency.



We are urgently looking for a new Amazon PPC manager.



Responsibilities:



- Develop, implement, and manage Amazon Sponsored Products and Sponsored Display campaigns.

- Manage advertising for multiple clients and a wide range of products across both the US and European Amazon marketplaces.

- Conduct regular campaign optimizations to improve ACOS and TACOS, reduce wasted spend, and drive profitability.

- Take a holistic approach to PPC, ensuring that products are retail-ready before scaling traffic.

- Provide detailed, data-driven reports with both performance metrics and strategic insights.

- Stay up to date with Amazon advertising trends, algorithm updates, and best practices.

- Manage budgets effectively and forecast performance and spend across multiple accounts.



Requirements:



- Proven experience in managing Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products and Sponsored Display) - this is a must.

- Experience working with both European and US Amazon marketplaces.

- Strong understanding of Amazon as a platform, including listing optimization, keyword research, and conversion drivers.

- Ability to analyze product performance holistically and make strategic decisions based on data and product health.

- Skilled in generating comprehensive reports and providing clear performance overviews and insights.

- Experience managing multiple clients and product portfolios simultaneously.

- Proficient in tools such as Helium 10.

- Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to work independently and manage deadlines.



HOW TO APPLY:



1. Send us your resume and, if possible, a portfolio of brands you’ve worked with.

2. Share the categories you have worked in, the maximum number of SKUs you’ve managed at once, and the markets you’ve worked with. + let us know for how long you have been managing Amazon PPC.

3. Record a short video explaining briefly how you generally approach PPC.



We would like to start on hourly-based work where we test our collaboration, but then we switch to part
-time.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview: 



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office. 



 

Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 

About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 

Objectives: 

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.



 

Competencies: 

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.



 

Equipment Requirements:  

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



 

Physical Requirements: 

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.

 

Benefits: 

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply: 



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below. 




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply. 



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Full-time KYC Analyst (Remote)
description:
About Us

We are an international company working with a remote team in the Philippines since 2008. We value professionalism, colllbration, and the ability to adapt in a fast-paced global enviroment. Our team thrives on mutual respect, accountability, and continuous improvement, and we’re looking for someone who shares these values.



About You

We are looking for a highly accurate, detail-oriented, and analytical KYC Analyst to join our Compliance team. You will be responsible for conducting KYC and KYB checks, ensuring regulatory compliance, and supporting our onboarding and verfication processes. The ideal candidate has strong attention to detail, works with integrity, and is comfortable handling sensitive information.

title: Customer Support Representative – DTC Comfort Footwear Brand (US Market)
description:
Customer Support Representative – DTC Comfort Footwear Brand (US Market)



Schedule: Monday–Saturday, 1:00 PM – 8:00 PM US/Eastern (7-hour shift) Rate: $5/hour + performance bonuses Tools: Gorgias, Slack, Shopify, Google sheets (excel), Trustpilot, WhatsApp



The Brand

We're a fast-growing direct-to-consumer footwear brand designing comfort shoes for men and women aged 50+. Our shoes look normal — not medical, not clunky — just well-made shoes that happen to feel incredible. We sell primarily through our Shopify store, driven by paid social traffic (Meta ads).

Our customers are loyal when treated right and vocal when they're not. That's where you come in.



The Role

You are the voice of this brand. Every
 you send either builds trust or breaks it. You'll be the sole CS representative handling all inbound customer
s through Gorgias — returns, exchanges, shipping questions, damaged items, cancellations, and the occasional angry customer threatening a chargeback.



This is not a "copy-paste templates and hope for the best" role. You'll use proven templates and a custom AI copilot as your foundation, but you'll need the judgment to know when to personalize, when to escalate, and when to issue a refund immediately to protect the brand.



Your core responsibilities:

Clear overnight/Sunday ticket backlog within the first 2 hours of every shift

Handle live tickets with a target response time under 30 minutes

Triage urgent cases (cancellations, address changes, chargeback threats) immediately

Follow our structured refund ladder — 30% ? 50% ? full refund — with precision

Process refunds and replacements in Gorgias/Shopify and log them in our master sheet

De-escalate frustrated customers before they become disputes

Generate Trustpilot reviews from happy customers using our two-method system

Submit a daily end-of-shift report in Slack — every single day, no exceptions



What "A-Player" Looks Like in This Role



You don't just respond — you resolve. Our target is ?4 messages per ticket on average. That means your first reply needs to be so clear and complete that the customer doesn't need to write back three more times.



You protect the brand from chargebacks. If someone mentions "dispute," "bank," "fraud," or "lawyer" — you don't negotiate. You refund. Immediately. Then you report it. A $60 refund is always cheaper than a $60 chargeback + fees + a hit to our payment processor reputation.



You follow the system. We have templates, decision trees, escalation rules, and a refund ladder for a reason. You don't freelance on refund amounts. You don't promise faster shipping. You don't skip the photo proof step on damaged items. The system works — your job is to execute it with empathy and precision.



You generate reviews without being pushy. Our best review 
nts come from size exchanges where the customer keeps the original pair for free. You'll learn to spot the "wow" 
nts and use them strategically.

You communicate proactively with management. If you see a recurring issue with no template, you flag it. If you're unsure how to handle something, you ask in Slack — you don't guess. If Disputifier sends a fraud alert, you report it and wait for instructions.



The KPIs You'll Be Measured On (Weekly)

First response time during shift: ?60 minutes

Backlog clearance: ?2 hours after shift start

Chargeback threat handling: resolved within 30 minutes

CSAT score: ?4.6 / 5.0

Messages per ticket: ?4.0 average

End-of-shift reports: 100% compliance

Policy accuracy: ?99% on refund amounts and escalation steps

Zero urgent tickets left unresolved at end of shift



Bonuses

On top of the base rate, you'll earn performance bonuses tied to:

Trustpilot review generation (target: 10+ published reviews/month, minimum 4 stars)

Maintaining CSAT above target

Chargeback rate staying below 0.7%

Consistent zero-backlog end-of-shift performance

Specific bonus structure will be discussed with top candidates.



Requirements

Fluent, professional English — our customers are 50+ Americans. Your writing must be warm, clear, and free of slang or grammar issues.

Gorgias experience preferred (Zendesk, Freshdesk, or similar helpdesk experience accepted)

Shopify experience — you need to be comfortable navigating orders, processing refunds, and duplicating orders for replacements

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace — you're handling live tickets for 7 hours straight

Available Monday–Saturday, 1:00–8:00 PM US/Eastern — this is non-negotiable. The shift is designed around peak US customer activity.

Comfortable using AI tools — you'll use a custom GPT copilot for edge cases and need good judgment about when the AI output is right vs. when it needs editing



Nice to Have

Experience in DTC ecommerce customer support (especially footwear, apparel, or health/wellness)

Familiarity with chargeback prevention and dispute handling

Experience with Trustpilot or similar review platforms

Track record of high CSAT scores in previous roles



How to Apply

Send a short message (not a generic cover letter) answering these three questions:

Tell me about a time you de-escalated an angry customer who was threatening a chargeback or dispute. What did you do, and what was the outcome?

A customer writes in ALL CAPS saying they want a full refund because the shoes "look cheap." They haven't mentioned any defect — they just don't like the product. What do you do first? Walk me through your thinking step by step.

What's your current availability, and can you commit to the Monday–Saturday 1 PM–8 PM ET schedule?



Applications without answers to these three questions will not be reviewed.

title: Finance Manager (Hiring within 5 days)
description:
Location: Remote

Engagement: Fractional / Contract

Experience Level: Senior finance leader



About the role



This is not a passive or reporting-only role. You will work directly with founders and executive teams, turning financial data into decisions and owning cash clarity, forecasting, and strategic financial direction.



This role sits at the intersection of strategy and execution. You will guide financial planning, performance management, and capital strategy while working closely with FinOps delivery teams who handle day-to-day processing.



What you will do



Financial leadership

• Act as the primary financial advisor to founders and exec teams

• Translate financial performance into clear, actionable decisions

• Guide pricing, margin, hiring, and investment choices



Cash & runway ownership

• Own cashflow visibility and forecasting

• Define runway, burn, and liquidity risks

• Implement cash controls and prioritisation frameworks



FP&A and performance

• Build and maintain driver-based financial models

• Lead budgeting and forecasting cycles

• Define KPIs, dashboards, and performance frameworks

• Interpret variances and recommend corrective action



Month-end and financial integrity

• Review month-end outputs from FinOps teams

• Ensure reporting accuracy and commercial relevance

• Validate revenue recognition, cost allocation, and margins



Strategic finance

• Support fundraising, investor updates, and board packs

• Lead scenario modelling and growth planning

• Assess new initiatives, partnerships, and expansion plans



Finance maturity and systems

• Identify gaps in controls, tooling, and reporting

• Guide finance structure and automation direction

• Raise the overall financial discipline of the business



What success looks like

• Founders rely on you for decisions, not just reports

• Cash surprises disappear

• Forecasts become decision tools

• Financial conversations shift from historic to forward-looking



Who we are looking for



Experience

• Senior finance leadership in startups or scale-ups

• Strong FP&A and cashflow expertise

• Exposure to fundraising and investor reporting

• Comfortable working across multiple clients or entities



Skills

• Commercial mindset over pure accounting

• Ability to simplify complex financial realities

• Confident working hands-on in ambiguous environments

• Clear communicator with non-finance stakeholders



Mindset

• Operator first, advisor second

• Bias toward action and accountability

• Comfortable being embedded and owning outcomes



What this role is not

• Not a bookkeeping or transaction-processing role

• Not responsible for daily AP/AR or payroll

• Not a purely advisory or board-only position



You elevate, direct, and interpret financial reality.

title: Project Manager / Client Success Manager (E-commerce Performance Marketing)
description:
We are a well-established performance advertising agency with a strong reputation in the e-commerce space. Having worked with 300+ clients across international markets, we specialize in scaling 7 figure e-com brands through high-performance advertising, operational precision, and data-driven strategy.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Project Manager to take ownership of daily client communication, financial tracking, and operational coordination.



If you’re organized, sharp with numbers, and comfortable working in a fast-paced performance environment — this role is for you.



Responsibilities:

* Manage day-to-day communication with clients across
, WhatsApp, Slack,
, and calls

* Act as the main point of contact between clients and the internal team

* Track and manage client finances, budgets, and performance metrics using Google Sheets and internal dashboards

* Ensure accuracy in reporting, ad spend tracking, invoicing, and financial organization

* Support clients primarily with Meta-related issues, including ad account restrictions, compliance, and policy-related matters

* Assist with platform-related communication and support across TikTok, Google, Reddit, Bing, and other international media platforms

* Monitor campaign performance and proactively identify, flag, and escalate issues

* Maintain organized workflows, task tracking, internal notes, and documentation

* Ensure all client-related tasks and deliverables are completed on time and to a high standard





Requirements:

* Strong written and spoken English

* Proven experience in project management, client success, or account management

* High attention to detail — especially with numbers and data tracking

* Comfortable working with Google Sheets / Excel (must be precise)

* Basic understanding of Meta Ads /
 Ads ecosystem

* Strong organizational and multitasking skills

* Ability to handle multiple clients simultaneously

* Proactive mindset — you solve problems before they escalate

* Reliable, responsive, and structured in communication







Bonus (Not Required but Valuable)

* Experience working in a performance marketing agency

* Familiarity with Meta Business Manager & policy/compliance issues

* Understanding of ROAS, CPA, scaling strategies

* Experience with tools like Slack, Notion, ClickUp, etc.







Compensation

* Fixed salary: $900–$1,500/month depending on experience

* Performance-based bonuses based on client retention, accuracy, and overall performance

* Fully remote position

* Long-term role with growth into senior management

* Extra bonuses for work on weekends





How to Apply

* Your experience managing clients or projects

title: Remote Content Posting & System Monitoring Specialist
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a reliable and motivated individual to join our team as a Remote Content Posting & System Monitoring Specialist.



This role involves monitoring our internal systems and creating posts based on the information provided. The job itself is straightforward, and we will provide full training on our internal processes and tools.



What matters most for this position is strong English communication, attention to detail, and the ability to think critically when reviewing information.



We are looking for someone who is dependable, willing to learn, and able to work independently.



Responsibilities



* Monitor internal systems and dashboards

* Create posts based on system updates and information

* Follow internal workflows and processes

* Communicate clearly with the team when necessary

* Identify important updates or changes within the system

* Maintain accuracy and consistency in posts

* Strong English reading and writing skills

* Ability to think critically and use sound judgment

* Good communication skills

* Attention to detail

* Ability to work independently

* Willingness to learn new systems and processes

* Reliable internet connection

Important

How to Apply



To apply, please include the following:

3. Confirmation that you can complete tasks without using AI tools



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant (Admin + Social Media + Canva Design)
description:
About Us

We are a growing education business in Singapore, focused on helping primary school students develop their English writing skills.



We are looking for a highly meticulous and responsible Virtual Assistant who can support both administrative and creative work.



This role is ideal for someone who:

- Enjoys providing administrative assistance

- Has a sharp eye for detail 

- Takes pride in producing clean, well-organised work

- Has a strong sense of design and presentation 

- Is highly initiative and ensures tasks are completed efficiently



Your Role



You will work closely with the overall Teacher-in-Charge as her personal assistant to handle tasks such as:



1. Admin & Detail Work (Core Priority)

- Formatting worksheets, creating teaching slides and lesson materials

- Adding watermarks to PDFs and documents

- Organising files (Google Drive / OneDrive)

- Ensuring accuracy and consistency in all materials



2. Social Media & Creative Work

- Designing Instagram and
 posts (images, carousels, reels)

- Creating simple short-form videos (Reels)

- Turning lesson materials into social media content

- Assisting with planning of content calendar, content scheduling and posting

- Maintaining clean and consistent visual style



3. General Support

- Following SOPs and improving them where needed

- Handling ad-hoc tasks that can be delegated

- Suggesting improvements to workflow and systems



Requirements:



We are NOT just looking for someone who can “do tasks”. We are looking for someone who is:



1. Extremely Detail-Oriented

- You notice small mistakes others miss

- You double-check your work before submission

- You follow instructions exactly



2. Able to Think (Not Just Follow)

- You ask questions when something is unclear

- You point out potential mistakes or better ways of doing things



3. Creative with Good Aesthetic Sense

- You can design clean, modern visuals (not cluttered)

- You understand what looks appealing on social media



4. Has strong written English

- As an English language school in Singapore, we require you to be able to produce error-free content and accurately spot and correct mistakes in lesson materials and social media content.



5. Required Skills

- PowerPoint slides (create slides, presentation)

- Canva (create images, reels, animation)

- Basic video editing (reels / short-form content)

- Familiar with posting, scheduling, commenting, DMs on Instagram &

- Good written English

- Knowledge of AI research an advantage



This Role is NOT for You If:

- You rush through work and make careless mistakes

- You lack initiative and wait for instructions 

- You complete tasks without thinking

- You say “yes” to everything but don’t clarify doubts

- You struggle with organisation

- You are not good at English



Bonus (Good to Have):

- Cheerful and positive disposition

- Experience working with education businesses

- Experience creating worksheets or learning materials

- Familiarity with Google Drive / OneDrive systems



Application Instructions:

To apply, please follow all instructions carefully:



1. Use subject line: Meticulous VA Application – [Your Name]

2. Answer the following:

Q1. Tell me about a time you caught a mistake others missed. What happened?

Q2. If you are given unclear instructions, what would you do?

Q3. Share 2 samples of your Canva or social media work

Q4. In one sentence: What does “being detail-oriented” mean to you?



Lastly, provide an estimated map or flight distance from your city to Manila. Include the word “PINEAPPLE” at the end of your application. 



Salary & Working Arrangement:

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Full-time (6 days per week) based on the Singapore working calendar and business hours (no time zone difference between the Philippines and Singapore)

- PH 25,000 per month (PH 27,500 upon confirmation after 6 months)

- Company benefits for full-time employees

title: AI Automation Engineer & Systems Builder
description:
QUICK OVERVIEW

Position: AI Automation Engineer (Full-Time, Remote)

Hours: 35–40 hours/week, flexible schedule

Starting Salary: $800/month

Salary Growth: Automatic +$100 raise every 4 months (up to $1,200/month max)

Start Date: As soon as possible

Contract: Long-term – this is a career, not a project



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing digital business company based in Germany that builds and operates AI-powered automated business systems for coaches, consultants, and course creators. Our clients pay us to set up fully automated AI teams that handle their content creation, customer support, funnel optimization, and reporting.



We use cutting-edge technology: Paperclip AI for multi-agent orchestration, Claude Code (Anthropic) for agentic coding, n8n for automation workflows, and German-hosted servers for GDPR compliance.



This is not a typical VA job. You will not be doing data entry or answering
s. You will be building and deploying AI-powered companies from scratch. Every week, you'll set up new systems, configure AI agents, and see real businesses come to life through your work. If you're excited about AI and want to be at the cutting edge – this is it.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Server & Infrastructure:



Provision and configure Linux VPS servers (primarily Hetzner, Ubuntu 24)

Install and maintain Node.js, Git, Claude Code CLI, and Paperclip AI

Set up SSL certificates, firewalls, backups, and monitoring

Ensure all deployments are GDPR-compliant on EU-hosted servers



Paperclip AI Company Configuration:



Create and configure complete AI companies within Paperclip

Set up AI agent teams (CEO, CTO, Engineers, Content Writers, Support Agents, Analytics)

Configure org charts, reporting lines, budgets, and heartbeat schedules

Write and optimize system prompts for each agent role

Set up governance rules, approval gates, and audit logging



Claude Code & Automation:



Use Claude Code CLI for agentic coding tasks

Create and maintain CLAUDE.md project configuration files

Build n8n or Make automation workflows (webhooks, API integrations, video pipelines)

Connect external services via MCP (Google Drive, Slack, GitHub,
 providers)

Build and test end-to-end workflows for content creation, support automation, and reporting



Quality Assurance:



Run complete functional tests on every setup before client handoff

Document all configurations in standardized project sheets

Troubleshoot and resolve issues independently using our SOPs





HARD REQUIREMENTS (Non-Negotiable)

You must have hands-on experience with at least 4 of these 6:



Linux server administration (Ubuntu/Debian) – you're comfortable in the terminal

Node.js and npm – installing packages, running scripts, debugging

Git – cloning repos, committing, branching, resolving conflicts

AI tools – Claude Code, ChatGPT API, or similar LLM-based development tools

Automation platforms – n8n, Make (Integromat), or Zapier at an advanced level

API integrations – RESTful APIs, webhooks, JSON, authentication (OAuth, API keys)



STRONGLY PREFERRED (Major Plus):



Hands-on experience with Paperclip AI (this is a huge advantage)

Experience with Claude Code CLI specifically (not just Claude chat)

Docker basics

Supabase or PostgreSQL experience

Video generation pipeline experience (Creatomate, Shotstack, Remotion, ffmpeg)

Understanding of MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Previous work building AI agent systems or multi-agent workflows





WHO YOU ARE AS A PERSON



Self-starter – you follow SOPs independently and don't need hand-holding

Proactive communicator – if something is unclear or broken, you say so immediately

Detail-oriented – one wrong API key means a client has a bad experience

Systems thinker – you don't just complete tasks, you improve processes

Reliable – you show up every day and deliver consistently

Good English skills – you'll read documentation, write configurations, and occasionally join calls

Genuinely excited about AI – this field moves fast, we need someone who keeps up because they want to





WHAT WE OFFER

Salary: $800/month starting, growing automatically to $1,200/month



Month 1–4: $800/month

Month 5–8: $900/month

Month 9–12: $1,000/month

Month 13–16: $1,100/month

Month 17+: $1,200/month (maximum)



These raises are automatic. Not "performance-based maybe." If you're here and doing the work, you get the raise. Period.

Additional benefits:



Flexible 35–40 hour schedule – we care about output, not clock-watching

Long-term job security – we're building a business, not hiring for a one-off project

Career growth – you'll become our lead technical person with potential to manage future hires

Access to cutting-edge AI tools before most people even know they exist

Clear SOPs for everything – no guesswork, no confusion

Software licenses and server access provided

Payment monthly, on time, every time – via Wise, PayPal, or direct bank transfer

Paid Philippine holidays + reasonable time off with advance notice





TYPICAL WEEK

Monday: Check active client systems, review overnight agent logs, start new client setup if queued

Tuesday–Wednesday: Deep work – server provisioning, Paperclip configuration, agent setup, n8n workflows

Thursday: Testing & QA – run checklists on completed setups, fix issues, document everything

Friday: Optimization – improve existing client systems, update prompts, implement new features

Ongoing: Quick troubleshooting as needed (usually under 30 min/day), 
 communication via Slack or



HOW TO APPLY

IMPORTANT: Generic applications will be ignored. We want to see that you actually read this listing and have real experience.

Include the following in your application:



Subject line: "AI Automation Engineer – [Your Name] – [Years of relevant experience]"

A short intro (3–5 sentences): Who are you, what's your background, and why does this role excite you?

Proof of experience: Links, screenshots, or Loom videos showing AI agent systems, Paperclip setups, n8n workflows, or server configurations you've built. NO PROOF = NO INTERVIEW. A 2-minute Loom video showing something you've built is worth more than a 2-page resume.

Answer this question: "What is the most complex automation or AI agent system you have built, and what was the result?" (3–5 sentences)

Your availability: When can you start? What are your working hours?





WHAT HAPPENS AFTER YOU APPLY

Step 1: We review your application (1–3 business days)

Step 2: If you pass, we send you a small paid test task ($50) – a real-world scenario that takes 2–3 hours

Step 3: 30-minute video call to discuss the role and answer your questions

Step 4: If it's a fit, you start with a 2-week trial period at full pay

title: Hybrid Media Buyer / Creative Strategist / AI Content Operator
description:
We are looking for a highly capable hybrid marketer who can support both performance marketing and creative production. This person should be comfortable working across media buying, ad creative ideation, basic design or video editing, and AI-assisted content workflows.

This is not a narrow specialist role. We need someone who can think like a marketer, move like an operator, and execute like a hands-on creator.

The ideal person understands how ads work, can help generate and improve creative ideas, use AI tools to speed up production, and collaborate closely with the team to launch, test, and optimize campaigns faster.



Main Responsibilities:

Support media buying efforts across platforms like Meta, Google, YouTube, or similar

Help develop ad concepts, hooks, angles, and creative testing ideas

Create or improve static ads, video ads, and AI-generated content

Use AI tools to assist with ideation, scripting, asset generation, editing, and workflow speed

Produce or coordinate short-form ad creatives, including B-roll, talking-head, UGC-style, and direct response formats

Work with spreadsheets, briefs, and feedback systems to keep production organized

Help analyze ad performance and identify what should be iterated, improved, or scaled

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers to keep launches moving quickly

Follow brand direction while still bringing fresh ideas and initiative



Required Skills:

Experience with media buying or paid ads strategy

Strong understanding of direct response marketing and performance creatives

Basic to intermediate design skills

Basic to intermediate video editing skills

Ability to create or improve ad creatives independently

Familiarity with AI tools for marketing or content creation

Good understanding of hooks, angles, offers, and what makes an ad convert

Ability to work fast, take feedback well, and iterate quickly

Strong organizational skills and comfort working in fast-moving environments



Preferred Skills:

Experience running or supporting Meta Ads campaigns

Experience with Google Ads or YouTube Ads

Experience creating UGC-style or conversion-focused short videos

Ability to prompt AI tools for images, videos, scripts, voice, or creative ideation

Understanding of landing pages, funnels, and conversion flow

Experience using tools like CapCut, Premiere, After Effects, Canva, Figma, ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Kling, Runway, Sora, or similar

Ability to generate B-roll concepts and produce supporting creative assets

Some copywriting ability for ad scripts, headlines, and CTAs

Strong taste in creative and ability to spot weak ads quickly



Ideal Profile:

Hybrid marketer with both creative and performance thinking

Not just an editor, not just a buyer

Someone proactive who can solve problems without waiting for every instruction

Comfortable with testing, learning, and adapting quickly

Understands that speed matters, but quality still matters too

Can work with AI as a tool, not as a crutch



Nice-to-Have Skills:

Experience in e-commerce, lead generation, or direct response brands

Experience managing freelancers or coordinating creative production

Familiarity with performance reporting and reading ad metrics

Ability to work across multiple projects and priorities

International market experience or localization awareness



What Success Looks Like in This Role:

More creative tests launched per week

Better speed from idea to finished ad

Stronger coordination between media buying and creative production

Faster iterations based on ad performance

Better use of AI tools to reduce bottlenecks and increase output

title: Urgent Hiring! Experienced Bookeepers (Manila Based Candidates Only)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Bookeepers to join our growing team.



The Role Overview



The successful candidate will play a key role in maintaining accurate financial records for a portfolio of clients. You will work closely with our accounting team in Ireland to ensure that bookkeeping tasks are completed accurately, efficiently, and in line with Irish and UK accounting standards.



This is an excellent opportunity for a highly organised professional who enjoys structured work, problem solving, and delivering high-quality financial information.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Processing and posting purchase invoices and supplier payments

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Maintaining accurate purchase and sales ledgers

• Preparing bookkeeping schedules to support monthly management accounts

• Supporting VAT return preparation and reconciliation

• Investigating and resolving reconciliation differences

• Maintaining organised and well-documented financial records

• Communicating with internal teams regarding queries or missing information

• Supporting process improvements and workflow efficiencies

________________________________________

Key Skills & Experience



Technical Skills

-Strong understanding of double-entry bookkeeping (debits and credits)

-Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

-Experience with bank reconciliations and ledger management

-Good exposure to VAT processes

-Experience with accounting software such as:

o Xero

o QuickBooks Online

o Sage (desirable)

o Dext (desirable)



Professional Skills

Highly developed organisational skills

Strong time management and deadline management

Ability to prioritise tasks and manage multiple client workloads

Methodical and structured approach to completing work

Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Excellent English language skills



Additional Requirements

-Understanding of Irish or UK business practices is highly desirable

-Ability to work effectively within a remote international team

-A proactive mindset with a strong sense of responsibility for work quality

-Currently residing in around Greater Manila area 

________________________________________

What We Offer

-Opportunity to join a growing international finance outsourcing firm

-A chance to become part of a pioneering Manila-based team

-Direct support and mentoring from our Ireland head office

-Ongoing training and professional development

-Opportunities for career progression and promotion as the team expands

-A collaborative and supportive team environment

-Stable weekday working hours (11 AM – 7 PM) with weekends off

________________________________________

Who This Role Would Suit



This role is ideal for an experienced bookkeeper who enjoys structured financial work, takes pride in accuracy, and wants to be part of a growing international finance team.



You will thrive in this position if you are detail-oriented, reliable, organised, and committed to producing high-quality financial records.
